title: Web Developer
description:
Project: Ocean Edge Media – WordPress Website with Integrated Booking, Payments, Media Delivery, SEO & Automation



Overview:

I currently have a Canva website ([
](
)) and a separate booking system. I want everything rebuilt into a single WordPress website that integrates booking, payments, file handling, automation, and SEO.



The structure, services, and pricing format are already clearly laid out in my existing website and booking platform. The goal is to replicate and improve this system inside WordPress using simple, reliable tools (no unnecessary custom development).



---



REFERENCE SYSTEMS (IMPORTANT):



* Current Website:

  [
](
)



* Current Booking System:

  



The developer must review both of these to understand:



* Service structure

* Pricing tiers

* Booking flow

* General layout and functionality



This structure should be replicated and improved within WordPress.



---



OBJECTIVES:



* Combine website + booking + payments + file delivery into one platform

* Achieve strong Google rankings (SEO is extremely important)

* Automate booking, communication, and delivery workflows

* Maintain a clean, modern, professional design

* Ensure the system is easy for me to edit and manage after completion



---



PLATFORM REQUIREMENTS:



* WordPress

* Elementor (or similar visual builder)

* Amelia booking plugin (preferred)

* Rank Math SEO plugin



---



WEBSITE STRUCTURE:



Pages required:



1. Home

2. Services

3. Booking (integrated system)

4. Contact

5. Privacy Policy

6. Terms of Service



---

title: Graphic Designer
description:
As a graphic designer, I create visuals that help communicate ideas clearly and creatively. My work is all about turning concepts into designs that people can see, understand, and connect with—whether it’s for social media, branding, or marketing materials.



I usually start by understanding what the client or team needs, then I brainstorm and sketch ideas before bringing them to life using design tools like Photoshop or Illustrator. I pay close attention to details like color, layout, and typography to make sure everything looks clean, professional, and visually appealing.



Being a graphic designer means I’m always learning keeping up with design trends and improving my skills so my work stays fresh and relevant.



Overall, my role is to make ideas visible and impactful through design.

title: Cinematic AI Video Editor (Luxury Streetwear Brand | Storytelling & Ads)
description:
Who We Are

Love of God is a faith-driven clothing brand and cultural movement anchored in 1 John 4:16. We are not a Christian merchandise shop. We are building something with the visual weight and cultural seriousness of Fear of God, the storytelling depth of a film house, and a mission that goes beyond product. Every piece we make is a vehicle for real faith conversations.

We are growing fast. Our creative needs are growing with it.

What We Need

We are hiring one person who produces cinematic, high-end AI video and imagery — the kind that stops the scroll, communicates a brand world, and makes apparel feel like it carries weight.

This is a part-time role to start. For the right person, it becomes full-time as the brand scales. We are not looking for someone to fill hours. We are looking for someone to grow with us.

This role covers four output types:



Drop Campaigns. Short narrative films for new product releases. Think mood, tension, light, story — not a product showcase.

Instagram Reels. High-retention, visually striking content that builds the brand world in 15 to 60 seconds.

Ad Creatives. Paid social videos for Meta that convert — cinematic enough to hold attention, structured well enough to drive action.

Still Imagery. High-end AI-generated product and lifestyle images for use across ads, website, and organic content. Editorial-grade. Not stock photo energy.



What the Work Looks Like



You receive a brief: product, scripture anchor, mood, and reference direction

You produce video or imagery that feels like it came from a $50,000 production budget

You deliver on time, at a quality level where we do not have to ask for revisions twice



You will be working with tools like Runway, Kling, Sora, Pika, Midjourney, Flux, CapCut, Premiere, or whatever combination gets the result. We care about output, not software loyalty.

What You Must Have



A portfolio of AI-generated or AI-assisted video and image work that is genuinely cinematic. If your reel looks like stock footage with text overlays, do not apply. If your images look like generic AI output, do not apply.

Demonstrated ability to match a brand aesthetic and maintain it across multiple pieces

Understanding of visual storytelling — pacing, contrast, emotion, silence

Experience producing content for fashion, lifestyle, or faith-based brands is a strong advantage

Ability to take a creative brief and deliver without hand-holding

Reliable internet, professional communication, and the ability to meet deadlines without reminders



What You Do Not Need

You do not need a camera. You do not need a studio. You need taste, craft, and the ability to use AI tools at a level most people cannot reach yet.

Compensation

$300–$500/month USD to start, part-time. As output volume increases and the brand scales, this role moves to full-time with compensation to match. We reward people who grow with us.

How to Apply

Do not send a generic application. We will not read it.

Send us the following:



Your top 3 videos. Direct links only. Pick your three best. If you cannot identify your three best, that tells us something.

Your top 3 images. Direct links or a single clean portfolio page. Same standard — best only.

One sentence per piece explaining what the brief was and what you were trying to achieve creatively.

One paragraph explaining why you want to work on a faith-based brand specifically — not any brand, this brand.

Your tool stack. What AI tools do you use for video and image work, and what does each one do best in your workflow?



Applications without all five components will be ignored.

We are not the fastest to hire. We are the most deliberate. If your work is right, we will reach out.

We are looking for an experienced, proactive, and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant (VA) to help build and manage our Amazon FBA operations. Remote work with flexible scheduling.

title: Looking for ELITE Ecom Video Editors Specializing in AI UGC Ads for Meta Ads (7 Figure Founder)
description:
We run multiple ecommerce brands (women’s clothing + health/supplements) generating consistent daily revenue through Meta ads.



We’re scaling aggressively and need reliable, experienced ecommerce video editors who specialize in AI-generated UGC ad creatives — the format that’s dominating Meta right now.

This is Meta ads ONLY. Not YouTube. Not static ads. Not brand videos. If you don’t have direct experience editing AI UGC video ads that have actually performed and scaled on Meta/Facebook/Instagram, this isn’t the right fit.



LEAD WITH PROOF. Show me your best-performing AI UGC ad work. Show me the ROAS. Show me the metrics. Show me CTRs, CPAs, and spend levels. If you can’t back up your work with real Meta ad performance data, don’t apply. I’ve seen enough nice-looking edits with zero proof behind them. Convince me you’re the best candidate over everyone else applying.



What You’ll Primarily Be Editing

AI UGC and UGC Ads + AI Voiceover is our bread and butter. The majority of what you’ll produce will be AI-generated voiceover ads that follow a script — think AI avatar footage, AI/UGC b-roll, and scripted AI voiceover layered together into scroll-stopping creatives. Beyond that, you’ll also work on:

AI voiceover-driven ads following detailed scripts and angles

AI-generated UGC-style video ads (AI avatars, AI lifestyle footage, AI b-roll)

Hook variations and modular ad components for rapid testing

Mashups and iterations of winning AI creatives

Traditional UGC edits when needed (talking head, testimonials, try-ons)

Product showcase and lifestyle footage edits



How This Works

I provide the creative direction. You’ll receive an ad brief and/or script. Your job is to take that brief and produce clean, high-converting Meta ads using the best AI tools available. I review, you revise if needed, and we repeat.



What We Need From You

A strong portfolio showing ecommerce AI UGC ad work with real Meta ad metrics attached — ROAS, CPA, CTR, ad spend. No metrics, no consideration.

Proven experience producing AI UGC ads that have actually converted and scaled on Meta.



You must already have subscriptions and access to the top AI video generation tools (Veo, Sora, Higgsfield, HeyGen, Arcads, Creatify, Synthesia, ElevenLabs, to name a few). We’re not paying for you to learn these tools — you should already be deep in them.



Deep understanding of what makes someone stop scrolling in the first 1–3 seconds.

Experience with AI voiceover ads that follow a scripted structure.

Ability to follow creative briefs closely while still bringing your own creative eye.

Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality.

Comfortable with volume (5–10+ creatives per week depending on workload).

Strong, responsive communication and reliable availability.



Tools

Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve preferred. Familiarity with After Effects or CapCut for motion graphics and quick iterations is a plus. Most importantly — you need to already be equipped with the latest AI video generation and AI voiceover tools and know how to use them at a high level.



What We Offer

Competitive pay with room to grow as we scale

Performance-based incentives to be discussed as we build the relationship

Work across multiple brands and niches (women’s clothing now, health/supplements coming soon) — more variety, more volume

A positive, respectful working environment — no micromanaging, no toxicity

Flexible hours — we care about output, not when you’re online

Ongoing, consistent work — this is not a one-off project



To Apply

Send your portfolio with 10+ examples of AI UGC ecommerce ads you’ve edited that actually performed. Include Meta ad metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR, spend) for as many examples as possible.



No screenshots of ads with high ROAS but low spend (winning ads under $1,000 in spend won’t do it). If you don’t have the winning ad metrics to back you up, this won’t be for you. Tell me which AI tools and subscriptions you currently use.

Tell me your typical turnaround time and weekly availability.



If you can consistently deliver clean, high-converting AI UGC and UGC with AI Voiceover creatives backed by real results, there’s plenty of volume and long-term opportunity here. Let’s work!

title: Webflow Developer (Short-Term Project – Scroll Animation & Brand Reveal)
description:
Project Type: Temporary / Project-based



Platform: Webflow



Template in Use: Rustico Webflow Template (
)



----------



Overview



We’re looking for a skilled Webflow developer to build a high-impact, scroll-based brand reveal section on our website.



This section will introduce our new branding and logomark through a cascading animation as users scroll down the page. The experience should feel premium, smooth, and intentional.



If this project is executed well, there will likely be additional Webflow work in the future.



---



What We Need Built



We need cascading elements as you scroll down the webpage that introduces our new branding and logomark as it fade in (or stack in, from the top to bottom) piece by piece with a small bit of text explaining the element. 



When the next piece comes, the previous text will fade and the new one will fade in. Eventually, once the full logomark is assembled, it should move to the left (or right) with a fade in of more text which will be a little "about us" on the right hand side.



More technical detail:



1. Cascading Logomark Assembly

    - Individual elements of our logomark fade or stack in sequentially (top to bottom or layered build).

    - Each element appears as the user scrolls.



2. Dynamic Text Transitions

    - As each new logomark element appears:

        - The previous explanatory text fades out.

        - New corresponding text fades in.

    - Smooth transitions with no layout shift.



3. Final Composition State

    - Once the full logomark is assembled:

        - It shifts left (or right).

        - A larger “About Us” text block fades in on the opposite side.



4. Fully Editable Setup

    - All text, animation timing (where possible), and structure must be editable inside Webflow.

    - Clean class naming and structured layout.



5. Knowledge Transfer

    - Walk us through how it’s built.

    - Show us how to edit and maintain it.

    - Ideally provide a short Loom walkthrough.



---



Technical Expectations



- Strong experience with:

    - Webflow Interactions (IX2)

    - Scroll-based animations

    - Clean layout structuring

- Ability to extend beyond default interactions if needed (custom code acceptable if justified)

- Maintain responsiveness across desktop, tablet, and mobile

- Performance-conscious implementation (no laggy animation chains)



---



Deliverables



- Fully implemented section inside our existing Rustico template

- Responsive across breakpoints

- Editable CMS-friendly structure (if applicable)

- Handover walkthrough



---



To Apply



Please include:

- 2–3 examples of scroll-based Webflow animations you’ve built

- Confirmation that you can make this fully editable

- Estimated timeline

- Fixed project price



---



If this project goes well, we anticipate ongoing collaboration for future Webflow enhancements.

title: CONSTRUCTION SALES
description:
We are looking for a sales representative who can handle incoming leads, qualify potential clients, and close projects. The person must be comfortable speaking with clients, understanding their needs, and moving them through our sales process.



Responsibilities include:



• Calling hot leads that come from marketing campaigns

• Qualifying clients (project type, location, timeline, budget)

• Explaining our services clearly and professionally

• Scheduling estimates or consultations for our team

• Performing strong and consistent follow-ups until the client responds or closes

• Updating lead information inside the CRM system

• Moving leads through the sales pipeline (lead ? qualified ? estimate ? contract)



When there are no incoming leads, the sales representative must also perform cold calls to potential clients such as property managers, HOAs, developers, and contractors to introduce our services and create new opportunities.



Strong follow-up is very important. Many clients do not respond immediately, so the sales representative must follow up with calls, messages, and reminders until a clear answer is received.



Services we sell



We provide construction, maintenance, and subcontracting services such as:



• Roofing repair and replacement

• Exterior and interior painting

• Tile installation

• Carpentry work

• Metal work

• General construction and repairs

• Building maintenance for residential communities

title: Full-time Entry Virtual Associate (VA) Positions. Philippines time zone. 260319

Join our team if you have a keen eye for detail, an unwavering drive for productivity, and a strong sense of responsibility. You will receive training and support for your work. Candidates without experience but willing to learn and grow are welcome.

This is for candidates who are keen to develop a professional career that allows you to work remotely and independently. There are career paths with promising future opportunities that have traditionally been accessible only through conventional means. However, our embrace of technology, good jobs are no longer restricted to traditional ways.



About Us

With these partners, we have one of the largest, most-respected, and fastest-growing networks of advisers in the country. We provide sound and comprehensive financial advice at both individual and corporate levels.

• Takes initiative and works independently to address challenges, consistently seeking solutions.



Other Matters

We will be communicating via various communication tools. There will be a probation period for one to three months, depending on your qualifications and experience, which is negotiable. Upon the completion of your probation period, you will become eligible for a 13th-month bonus, paid time off, and a range of employee benefits, including PhilHealth and the Social Security System. The annual performance bonus is determined by your key performance indicators (KPIs). You will follow the time zone of the Philippines. Among colleagues, your working hours may be arranged in rotation, including weekdays and weekends. A total work week of 40 hours. Your further potential salary growth will be based on your performance, which may be increased during the quarterly review.



Loan Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Engage with incoming leads primarily through WhatsApp on our business phone.

• Oversee client relationships and enhance processes through multiple CRM platforms.



Insurance and Investment Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Prepare the required documentation for the client's application, available in various systems.

• Reach out to clients through WhatsApp using our business phone, primarily to provide reminders and follow-ups.

• Utilize WhatsApp (business phone) as the main channel to engage clients and schedule appointments effectively.

• Craft client proposals utilizing the provided templates.

• Helping clients with insurance claims

• Contact insurers to obtain quotes and provide recommendations to clients.

• Oversee client relationships and streamline processes through a range of CRM systems.



Candidates who have shown capability and knowledge may be groomed towards senior roles or management roles.



Application

To apply for the job:

Please log in and click the link below to apply, and please follow the instructions.



There will be an assessment and a Microsoft Teams interview video call required, if you are shortlisted.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
am looking for a high-calibre remote assistant with strong strategic and editorial instincts, not simply someone to carry out administrative tasks. The right person will help me develop a credible and commercially useful public profile through LinkedIn, written thought leadership, and potentially a newsletter or
-based professional community.



This role would suit someone who understands how to help a senior professional build authority in a serious sector. I am looking for judgment, initiative, polish, and the ability to translate ideas into consistent, high-quality output.



What I Need Help With



1. LinkedIn strategy and execution

• Help shape a coherent LinkedIn presence aligned with my practice areas and business goals

• Turn voice notes, rough thoughts, articles, and case-related themes into polished posts

• Identify content themes that build authority, credibility, and engagement over time

• Maintain consistency in tone, presentation, and posting rhythm

• Advise on what is worth posting, how it should be framed, and how it fits into a broader strategy



2. Thought leadership development

• Support the creation of commentary, short articles, and insight pieces in areas such as ESG, regulation, risk, professional services, and legal developments

• Repurpose longer material into shorter-form content without losing quality or seriousness

• Help shape content around positioning, audience, and commercial relevance

• Bring editorial discipline to ideas so that output is clear, credible, and useful



3. Newsletter / community building

• Assist with setting up and developing an
/newsletter platform

• Help structure regular bulletins, updates, or curated commentary for a professional audience

• Think strategically about how to build an audience and community over time, rather than simply send content out

• Support systems for consistency, sign-ups, and distribution



4. Research and strategic support

• Carry out focused research on current legal, ESG, regulatory, and business topics

• Produce concise research notes and summaries that can feed into content and business development

• Identify trends, themes, or opportunities that may be worth commenting on publicly

• Help ensure content remains timely, relevant, and commercially intelligent



Who This Role Is For



This is for someone who can operate as a genuinely thoughtful right hand, with a mix of:

• content judgment

• editorial ability

• strategic awareness

• professional polish



I am not looking for a basic VA. I am looking for someone who can contribute ideas, improve positioning, and help build a serious professional presence over time.



Ideal Background



Strong candidates will likely have experience in one or more of the following:

• personal brand support for founders, consultants, lawyers, or executives

• LinkedIn content strategy

• newsletter writing or
 audience development

• editorial, copywriting, or research roles

• professional services, legal, finance, ESG, or B2B sectors



Skills Required

• Excellent written English

• Strong editorial judgment and attention to tone

• Ability to understand complex or technical subject matter and express it clearly

• Confidence working with limited direction and helping shape the brief

• High reliability, responsiveness, and discretion



Useful additional skills:

• newsletter platforms such as Mailchimp, ConvertKit, or Substack

• light SEO awareness

• Canva or simple visual formatting

• familiarity with UK professional services or legal content



Tone and Standard



The work needs to feel:

• intelligent

• measured

• polished

• professional

• commercially aware



You should be able to help develop the voice of a senior barrister and adviser, not produce generic social media content.



Hours and Rate

• Part-time initially, with scope to grow

• Likely starting range: 10–20 hours per week

• Budget: $5–$10+ per hour, depending on experience and quality

• I am open to paying more for someone genuinely strong who can add strategic value



Trial Task



Shortlisted candidates may be asked to complete a paid trial, for example:

• drafting 2–3 LinkedIn posts from rough notes

• proposing a content strategy for one month

• summarising an article or development into a professional bulletin-style format



I am looking to build a long-term working relationship with someone capable, thoughtful, and commercially switched on. The goal is not simply to outsource tasks, but to work with someone who can help develop a credible professional platform with real strategic value.

Title: The King Who Wanted More

There once lived a king who had everything.

Gold filled his palace.

Servants obeyed his every command.

His kingdom was rich and powerful.

But the king was not happy.

Every night, he walked alone through his halls of gold, feeling something… missing.

“What is the point of all this,” he whispered,

“if I can still want more?”

One day, a mysterious man appeared before him.

“I will grant you one wish,” the man said.

The king didn’t hesitate.

“I want everything I touch… to turn into gold.”

The man paused.

“Are you sure?” he asked.

“Yes,” the king replied.

The wish was granted.

At first, it was incredible.

The king touched a chair—gold.

A table—gold.

Even a simple flower became treasure.

He laughed.

“This is power,” he said.

But soon… hunger came.

He reached for food.

The 
nt he touched it… it turned to gold.

He tried to drink.

Gold.

Panic began to rise.

“What have I done?” he whispered.

Then, he heard a voice.

“Father!”

His daughter ran toward him and hugged him.

And in that 
nt…

everything changed.

She turned into gold.

The king stood frozen.

Silent.

Broken.

For the first time… he understood.

Not everything valuable can be turned into gold.

title: Marketing & Business Development Coordinator
description:
Marketing & Business Development Coordinator – Virtual Assistant

About the Company



We are a tech-forward hospitality and short-term rental (STR) management company focused on scaling a portfolio of high-performing properties. Beyond just managing "Airbnbs," we are building a world-class, data-driven co-hosting platform powered by smart systems, aggressive marketing, and strategic partnerships.



We are moving quickly to expand our footprint. We need a team member who is not just an administrator, but a growth-minded partner excited by the challenge of finding new leads, out-maneuvering competitors, and keeping our properties at the top of search results.

Position Summary



The Marketing & Business Development Coordinator will be the engine behind our growth and property visibility. This role is split between two primary objectives: Property Performance (ensuring our current listings dominate the market) and Portfolio Growth (finding and securing new co-hosting clients).



The ideal candidate is analytical, persuasive in writing, and comfortable with digital marketing tools. You won’t just be waiting for guests to book; you will be actively driving traffic, analyzing trends, and reaching out to local partners to expand our business.

Core Purpose



To maximize the revenue of our existing portfolio through expert digital marketing and to aggressively identify and nurture new business leads for our co-hosting services.

Key Responsibilities

1. Digital Marketing & Visibility (Primary Focus)



    Multi-Channel Marketing: Execute and monitor marketing campaigns across FB Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and niche
 Groups to drive booking traffic.



    Data Analytics: Utilize Google Trends and Google Analytics to identify seasonal shifts, guest behavior, and high-intent search terms.



    SEO & Ranking: Perform regular audits of Airbnb/VRBO page rankings; implement optimizations to ensure our properties stay on Page 1.



    Dynamic
 Campaigns: Draft and send marketing
s to past guests and leads featuring local "fun activities," events, and seasonal "reasons to stay" to drive repeat bookings.



2. Business Development & Lead Gen (Growth Focus)



    Realtor Outreach: Manage a referral program targeting local realtors; handle outreach and relationship nurturing to secure professional referrals for our co-hosting business.



    Lead Sourcing: Proactively find and "cold" research potential property owners who could benefit from professional management.



    Audit Scripting: Create and refine "Mini-Audit" scripts—concise, high-value teardowns of a potential client's current listing to show them exactly how we can increase their ROI.



    Competitor Analysis: Regularly monitor local "comps" to analyze their pricing, amenities, and guest sentiment, ensuring our portfolio maintains a competitive edge.



Requirements & Qualifications



    STR Experience: Prior experience in Short-Term Rental marketing or VA support for Airbnb hosts is highly preferred.



    Technical Marketing Literacy: Familiarity with Google Analytics,
 Ad Manager, and LinkedIn outreach tools.



    Growth Mindset: A background in sales support or lead generation; you aren't afraid to "knock on digital doors."



    Exceptional English: High-level written English is a must for drafting professional outreach to realtors and engaging marketing
s.



    Analytical Skills: Ability to look at a spreadsheet of competitor data or a Google Trend line and turn it into an actionable marketing "win."



Systems & Platform Experience



    Marketing Tools: FB/LinkedIn Ad Managers, Google Analytics, Google Trends.



    STR Tools: Airbnb/VRBO Ranking Trackers, PriceLabs or Wheelhouse (for competitor analysis).



    CRM & Outreach: Experience with
 marketing software (Mailchimp, Beehiiv, etc.) and CRM tools for lead tracking.



    Google Workspace: Expert level in Google Sheets for data tracking and competitor logs.



Ideal Candidate Traits



    Proactive Researcher: You don’t wait for instructions; you see a dip in ranking and investigate why.



    Persuasive Writer: You can write an
 to a realtor that feels like a partnership, not a "sales pitch."



    Data-Driven: You enjoy the "game" of SEO and seeing how your changes affect page ranking.



    Ambitious: You are excited by the prospect of helping a small business scale into a large-scale management firm.



Compensation & Schedule



    Schedule: Flexible/To be discussed (Expected 20–40 hours per week).



    Compensation: Base rate + performance-based bonuses tied to successful lead generation and referral conversions.

title: Ecommerce Administrative Assistant (Operations + Notion + Shopify) — Full-Time
description:
We are a category-leading women’s eCommerce brand on a mission to create premium, affordable, and 100% waterproof jewelry that enhances our customers’ everyday lives. We’ve served over 1,000,000 customers worldwide in more than 145 countries!



We’re hiring one or more sharp, proactive Administrative Assistants to support operations and execution across the business.



This is not a “basic VA role.” If you need reminders, struggle with details, or prefer slow-paced work, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast, organized, and detail-obsessed

• proactive (you spot issues before being asked)

• fluent in Notion (databases + task systems + SOPs)

• fluent in Shopify (orders + products + inventory fields)

• able to work reliably with Dubai time (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)



Working Hours (Dubai Time Requirement)



This is a full-time role with consistent daily coverage. To be considered, you must have consistent availability in Dubai time (UTC+4). Required working hours: 8 am – 4 pm Dubai time (UTC+4), Monday–Friday. Please do not apply if you cannot reliably cover these hours.



What You’ll Own (Core Responsibilities)



1) Operations Execution + Coordination



• Maintain internal task systems in Notion (databases, assignees, due dates, SOPs)

• Support daily operations tracking (orders, stock, shipments, urgent issues)

• Create structure: checklists, templates, and systems to keep execution clean



2) Shopify Admin Support



• Process and monitor orders, returns, and exchanges

• Update product listings and key Shopify admin fields accurately

• Maintain operational accuracy across inventory / pricing / product details (basic Shopify fluency is required — this is not optional)



3) Admin & Team Support



• Scheduling, calendar coordination, meeting agendas, notes, follow-ups

• Document management, data entry, reporting, and structured file organization

• Ensure tasks don’t slip through cracks (high ownership required)

• You will be expected to spot problems, propose solutions, and keep execution moving without needing constant direction



Additional Support Areas (As Needed)



This is primarily an operations + admin role. If you have additional skill, you may also support:



• light marketing coordination (uploading, scheduling, simple assists)

• invoice tracking / basic bookkeeping support

• research projects (suppliers, competitor scans, simple analysis)



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• 2+ years of experience as an admin assistant, operations assistant, or eCommerce VA

• Strong Notion fluency (databases, templates, task systems, SOP organization)

• Strong Shopify fluency (orders, products, admin navigation, accuracy)

• Extremely strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication (written + verbal)

• Able to work full-time and maintain Dubai time coverage



Bonus if you have:



• Richpanel or other helpdesk tools

• eCommerce fulfillment coordination experience

• spreadsheet reporting experience



If you’re a high performer, this role can become a long-term, career-defining growth path inside our company.



Competitive pay based on experience.



How to Apply



Please complete this application carefully (we will not review low-effort submissions):

Highly Desirable (but not required)

Training & Support

Working Hours & Pay



- Australian business hours

How to Apply



Please include:

- Link of previous report writing and defect quoting for fire systems

- Confirmation that you are comfortable working with structured templates and detailed instructions

title: Microsoft 365 Automation Lead – Power Platform, APIs & AI
description:
About Us



We are an Australian fire safety services company operating in residential and commercial buildings. Our goal is to streamline operations, reduce manual admin, improve technician communication, and increase transparency for clients and residents.



We already use:

- Uptick (job & compliance management)

- Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, SharePoint)

- Microsoft Teams



We would like to implement:

- Power Automate 

- Microsoft Bookings

- Copilot Studio (AI agents)



We are now looking for one skilled person to design, build, and progressively improve our automation ecosystem.



IMPORTANT – Read This First



This role is not about building everything at once.



It is a phased automation program, starting with low-risk native Microsoft 365 automation, then expanding into API-based integrations (Uptick API, Microsoft Graph) once the foundations are proven. Good judgement, system design, and documentation matter more than “clever” solutions.



The Big Picture Objective- Create a single, well-designed automation architecture that:



- Reduces manual and repetitive admin work

- Improves resident booking experience

- Gives management clear visibility (especially on mobile)

- Supports technicians with better information and fewer follow-ups

- Uses AI where it genuinely adds value

- Avoids duplicated systems and fragile integrations



PHASED SCOPE OF WORK

Phase 1 – Foundations (Immediate Priority – No Custom APIs)



Goal: Prove capability, architecture, and reliability.



Deliverables include:



1. Resident Self-Serve Booking System



Configure Microsoft Bookings for residential inspections



Enforce rules:

- Inspections only between 7:00am–10:00am

- Fixed appointment duration (e.g. 10 minutes)

- No exposure of technician calendars

- High-volume, resident-friendly setup



2. Copilot Studio AI Agent (Resident-Facing)



Conversational AI agent that:

- Collects building, unit number, resident details

- Explains inspection process and access requirements

- Answers common questions

- Guides residents to the correct Bookings page



3. Power Automate Workflows



Build clean, documented flows including:

- New Booking Flow

- Triggered by new Bookings appointment

- Writes to a SharePoint tracking list (not a second calendar)

- Sends confirmations and notifications

- 48-Hour Confirmation & Escalation Flow

- Chases access confirmations

- Escalates to office/strata if unresolved

- Reschedule / Cancellation Handling

- Keeps tracking data accurate

- Notifies relevant parties



4. SharePoint (Lightweight Use)



Simple tracking lists for:

- Residential bookings

- Exceptions (no access, no-shows, reschedules)

- SharePoint is not a scheduling system



Phase 2 – Management Visibility (Outlook Integration)



Goal: Let managers see technician schedules easily on mobile.



Integrate Uptick scheduling ? Outlook

- Provide a live or near-real-time shared calendar

- Avoid duplicated or manually maintained schedules

- Solutions may include:

- Native feeds (if supported)

- Power Automate polling

- Microsoft Graph (only if required)



Phase 3 – Uptick API Integrations (Advanced)



Goal: Reduce admin friction and improve data quality.



Examples:

- Pull job and schedule data from Uptick via API

- Sync to Outlook and/or SharePoint where appropriate

- Status-driven workflows

- Exception detection:

--Missing photos

--Incomplete reports

--Jobs stuck “in progress”



Must include:

- Secure authentication (OAuth / tokens)

- Error handling and logging

- Clear documentation



Phase 4 – AI & Copilot Expansion



Goal: Operational insight and decision support.



Examples:

- AI summaries for management

- Trend analysis (defects, delays, rework)

- Draft client communications

- Technician performance insights



Architectural Principles (Non-Negotiable)



- Uptick is the system of record

- Microsoft 365 automates, surfaces, and augments

- No duplicated calendars or data silos

- APIs only used where native connectors are insufficient

- Everything must be documented and maintainable





Required Skills - Must-Have

- Power Automate (advanced)

- Microsoft Bookings

- Copilot Studio / Power Virtual Agents

- SharePoint Lists

- Outlook & Teams integrations

- Strong system design thinking



Required for Later Phases

- REST API integrations

- OAuth / token-based authentication

- Microsoft Graph experience

- Experience integrating third-party platforms (e.g. Uptick)



Nice to Have

- Power BI 

- Experience in service or field-based businesses

- AI prompt design and Copilot optimisation



Deliverables

- Working automations (not demos)

- Clearly named and documented flows

- Copilot agent export + explanation

- SharePoint schema documentation

- Architecture overview (simple diagram)



Handover notes:

- What can be changed safely

- What should not be touched



Engagement Model

- Project-based with milestones

- Strong preference for a long-term automation partner



Initial Phase 1:

- 1 week for MVP

- 1–2 weeks for refinement

- Later phases scoped separately



To Apply (Applications Without This May Be Ignored)



Please include:

- Examples of Microsoft 365 automation projects you’ve built



Tools you’ve worked with:

- Power Automate

- Microsoft Bookings

- Copilot Studio

- APIs / Microsoft Graph



A short explanation of:

- When would you avoid using an API, even if one exists?

- Your preferred rate in AUD (hourly or project-based)



Why This Is a Strong Opportunity

- Clear scope and roadmap

- Modern Microsoft stack

- Real operational impact

- Opportunity for ongoing work if successful

- You will not be micromanaged — but quality matters

title: Social Media Chat Specialist
description:
I run a social media management business that works with online influencers, and I’m looking for someone who deeply understands Gen-Z internet communication.

Your role will involve managing conversations on behalf of influencers, responding to messages and keeping interactions natural, engaging, and entertaining.

A big part of this role is also helping influencers monetize their audience by naturally introducing and recommending products or offers during conversations.

This requires someone who can hold conversations, be funny, and smoothly guide interactions — without sounding pushy or corporate.

You should be comfortable writing in a Gen-Z texting style, similar to how people communicate on platforms like TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat, Discord, Reddit, and
/X.

This is not a corporate customer support role. Messages should feel like a real person texting, not a business responding.

If your writing style sounds like formal
s or support replies, this role will not be a good fit.



This is a huge opportunity I will train you under my wing, and you will eventually be in charge of managing a huge team who you train and manage. Long term position only, very good pay as I scale. 



What You'll Be Doing

• Managing conversations on behalf of influencers

• Responding quickly and maintaining active chats

• Keeping conversations engaging, playful, and entertaining

• Building ongoing relationships through chat

• Naturally introducing influencer offers within conversations

• Helping drive engagement and sales through chat

• Communicating in a natural Gen-Z texting style



Messaging Style (Very Important)

You will be writing messages on behalf of young influencers, so your writing style must match how people in their late teens and early twenties communicate online.

Messages should feel like casual texting, not formal writing.

This typically includes:

• lowercase texting

• casual conversational tone

• internet slang

• natural emoji use

• short messages

• social media communication style

Example tone (do not copy exactly)

heyyy what are u doing rn lol

u have no idea just how interesting i can be lmao xoxo

wait why did u disappear xoxo

lmaoo ur actually funny

If your writing style sounds like:

Hello, how are you today?

Thank you for your message.

Then this role will not be the right fit.



Requirements

• Excellent written English

• Strong understanding of Gen-Z internet culture

• Comfortable with sales and persuasion in chat

• Familiar with TikTok / Instagram / Reddit communication styles

• Fast typing speed

• Ability to manage conversations for extended periods

• Reliable internet connection and computer

Bonus if you’re familiar with:

• Discord communities

• meme culture

• online communities

• influencer marketing



Personality I'm Looking For

• Quick learner

• Observant and socially aware

• Naturally playful, teasing, and entertaining

• Comfortable with persuasion and sales

• Competitive and motivated by results

• Reliable and consistent



Compensation

• Competitive weekly salary

• Performance bonuses based on results

• Opportunity to grow into Team Leader / Trainer



Application Test (IMPORTANT)

Please complete all tasks below.

Your entire application must be written in Gen-Z texting style, as if you are a young influencer texting.

If your responses sound formal, structured, or like customer support, your application will not be considered.



Scenario 1

Someone new sends their first message. How would you greet them?



Scenario 2

Someone stops replying mid-conversation. What would you send to bring them back?



Scenario 3

Someone replies with just “lol”. Continue the conversation.



Scenario 4

Someone is being dry / low effort. Show how you would make the conversation more interesting.



Scenario 5

Continue this conversation with 3–5 messages:

User:

hey what are you doing rn

You:

just chilling lol

User: Im bored



Write 5 short messages you would send if someone hasn’t replied in a while.



Scenario 7

Turn this into a Gen-Z version:

“I am having a relaxing evening. What are you doing?”



Scenario 8

Someone says: “you’re funny lol”

How do you respond and keep momentum?



Write number 82 at the top so I know you have read all of this, I will know if answered by AI.



Bonus Task

Write a short 6–8 message conversation showing how you would:

• keep things playful

• build engagement

• keep the other person interested



As mentioned prior this is a huge opportunity, will be paid during training. Write the number 82 at the top so I know you have read all of it. Thank you for reading.

title: Sales Pro and Appointment setting Digital Agency
description:
JOB TITLE: Appointment Setter / Sales Rep (Digital Marketing – Home Services)



OVERVIEW:

We are looking for a strong, results-driven appointment setter who understands digital marketing and can talk to real business owners. Your job is to make high-volume outbound calls and book qualified appointments for our sales team.



This is NOT a basic VA role. We need someone confident on the phone who can control conversations and qualify leads properly.



---



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Make 100+ outbound calls per day

- Reach business owners in Florida (home services / home improvement)

- Schedule 1–3 appointments per day (minimum)

- Goal: 3–5 QUALIFIED appointments per day

- Follow up with leads and stay organized



---



WHAT YOU WILL BE SELLING:

- WordPress websites (design & development)

- Website management & maintenance

- Website hosting

- SEO services & retainers

- Google My Business management

- Ongoing marketing services



---



WHO YOU ARE CONTACTING:

- Local business owners ONLY

- Home services & home improvement companies

  (roofing, HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, etc.)



---



QUALIFICATION REQUIREMENTS (MUST CONFIRM BEFORE BOOKING):

You must ONLY book appointments if the lead has:



- Budget ? willing to invest in marketing

- Pain ? needs more leads, bad website, poor rankings, etc.

- Authority ? decision-maker (owner or manager)

- Timeline ? ready now or soon (not “just looking”)



If these are not clear ? DO NOT BOOK



---



REQUIREMENTS:

- Experience in appointment setting or sales (required)

- Experience with digital marketing or agency services (preferred)

- Strong English speaking skills (clear and confident)

- Comfortable making 100+ calls per day

- Able to handle rejection and push through objections

- Organized and results-driven



---



SUCCESS = RESULTS:

- 3–5 qualified appointments per day

- High show-up rate

- Real opportunities (not junk leads)





IMPORTANT:

We care about QUALITY over quantity.

Do not book bad appointments just to hit numbers.



If you can consistently bring in qualified opportunities, you will do very well here.

title: Medical Records Support with Scheduling Assistant - URGENT HIRING
description:
Take the next step in your professional journey!

Apply today through our official careers page: 



Company: Ascension Business Solutions LLC

Work Setup: Remote (Full-Time)

Role: Medical Records Support with Scheduling Assistant

Platforms: HomeCare HomeBase for medical records and Outlook

Start date: March 23, 2026



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITY:

Medical Records & Documentation Coordination

The VA will focus primarily on supporting your medical records workflow, including:

Verifying that required documentation is present (consents, NOMNC, etc.)

Following up with clinicians for missing documentation (Emergency Plan, Medication List, Calendar, etc.)

Preparing and sending Episode Summary Reports to physicians

Reviewing Discharge Summary timelines and flagging documentation outside the 5-day window

Monitoring unsuccessful fax reports and notifying the responsible staff

Verifying physician PECOS enrollment and updating the EMR as needed

Monitoring the Medical Records
 inbox and routing documentation appropriately

Assisting with mailing patient instruction sheets or amended consents when applicable



SECONDARY RESPONSIBILITY – Scheduling Assistance (During Downtime)

When medical records tasks are up to date, the VA can assist with scheduling-related support, such as:

Helping review schedules in HCHB

Assisting with filling open visits when needed

Supporting schedule updates or adjustments

Coordinating with clinicians regarding visit assignments

Medical records responsibilities will remain the primary priority, with scheduling support provided as time allows.



SCOPE BOUNDARIES:

To ensure compliance and maintain proper role separation, the VA’s work will remain administrative in nature.



The VA will:

Verify that documentation is present and complete

Follow up on missing documentation

Route records and assist with documentation workflows



The VA will not:

Interpret clinical documentation or wound images

Make clinical or compliance decisions

Modify care plans or physician orders

These items will continue to remain with licensed clinical staff.

Workload Consideration



QUALIFICATIONS:

Graduate of a 4-year course or a Bachelor’s degree

Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

Strong attention to detail, follow-through, and time management

Ability to work independently while following structured processes and SOPs

Familiarity with HomeCare HomeBase, Outlook, Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Slack, and similar tools

Willing to work an 8-hour graveyard shift - PH Time, aligned with U.S. business hours

Stable internet connection and reliable computer equipment (with backup)

Professional, coachable, and open to feedback and role reassignment as needed



Preferred (but not required):

Prior experience as a Virtual Assistant supporting U.S.-based clients

Experience in healthcare support, home care, recruitment, sales, scheduling, or operations

Familiarity with CRMs, scheduling platforms, EMRs/EHRs, or productivity tools

Ability to adapt across different support functions based on training and performance



THIS IS AN URGENT HIRING NEED.

Ascension Business Solutions is prioritizing this role due to active onboarding demands.

Qualified candidates who complete all application and assessment steps promptly may be contacted and processed on an accelerated timeline.



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS:

Ascension Business Solutions offers a structured, long-term employment opportunity designed to support stability, growth, and professional development.

Competitive compensation package starting commensurate with experience and role alignment

Paid training and structured onboarding

Fully remote work setup, including a company-issued laptop and noise-canceling headset (subject to role and eligibility guidelines)

HMO health coverage, subject to company eligibility requirements

Performance-based annual salary increases

Paid Time Off (PTO) to promote work-life balance and well-being

Retention bonus for long-term team members

Referral bonus program

Performance bonuses and incentive programs are available upon reaching 6 months of tenure



ABS is intentional about building long-term professional partnerships, not short-term or gig-based arrangements.



CAREER & COMPENSATION GROWTH:

Team members who demonstrate consistent performance, reliability, and alignment with ABS standards may be eligible for compensation growth over time. Based on performance and role alignment, there is a strong potential to reach a monthly salary of up to ?39,000 or more after one (1) year of continuous employment.



Note: Salary growth is performance-based and not guaranteed.



Why Join Ascension Business Solutions?

You are not working alone—you are backed by a company

Clear SOPs, documentation, and escalation support

Long-term stability with role mobility and growth opportunities

Structured training, coaching, and performance management

Values-driven culture guided by Love, Support, and Excellence



Disclaimer: Responsibilities may evolve based on business needs and client assignments. Employment is at-will.

Complete the Application Form and include the following:

Vocaroo introduction link

Updated resume

Device specifications screenshot

Internet speed test result



??This role is urgent. Early and complete applications will be prioritized. Incomplete applications may not be processed.

title: Video Editor (CEBU Based)
description:
The Creative Storyteller



As a Video Editor, you will be a key visual storyteller, creating engaging, educational, and inspirational video content to support Bai Finance's mission of making finance accessible to Filipino audiences. Your work will translate complex financial concepts into digestible and dynamic videos that resonate culturally and drive engagement across various social platforms.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Video Production: Produce and edit high-quality video content, including short-form (Reels, TikTok) and long-form (YouTube), from raw footage to final delivery. This includes adding captivating captions, on-brand transitions, sound effects, and background music.



2. Social Media Optimization: Adapt videos for different social media platforms by optimizing for correct aspect ratios (9:16, 1:1, 16:9), length, and incorporating platform-specific trends to maximize engagement.



3. Content Strategy and Collaboration: Work with the marketing and creative teams during brainstorming and planning stages to develop video ideas that align with marketing campaigns and brand objectives.



4. Asset Management: Organize and maintain a clean, accessible video and motion graphics library, ensuring brand consistency across all video output.



5. Trend and Platform Expertise: Proactively research and stay current with social media trends, video formats, and audio relevant to the financial and lifestyle content landscape in the Philippines.



6. Creative Direction: Provide creative input and occasionally assist in concept creation and shoot planning.



7. Post-Production Polish: Perform color correction and basic color grading to maintain a clean, professional, and consistent visual style across all videos.



Qualifications:



1. Experience: Proven track record as a Video Editor, with a strong portfolio of work demonstrating proficiency in both short-form and long-form video editing, preferably with experience in finance, real estate, or lifestyle content.



2. Software Proficiency: Expertise in professional video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve. Experience with Adobe After Effects for motion graphics and animation is a strong plus.



3. Creative Skills: Strong understanding of visual storytelling, pacing, and hooks for social media. A keen eye for detail is essential.



4. AI Adaptability: Familiarity with AI-powered editing tools (e.g., auto-captioning, scene detection) is a plus and shows a proactive approach to modern workflows.



5. Collaborative and Communicative: Able to work effectively in a fast-paced, remote, and collaborative team environment. Excellent communication skills in English and Filipino are a must.



6. Reliability: Dependable internet connection and a high-performance computer setup are required for a seamless remote workflow.



Please
 the following requirements to 



1. Updated Resume

2. Expected Salary

3. Sample Portfolio (link)

4. Confirmation of willingness to relocate to Cebu (this is a Cebu-based role, and relocation assistance will not be provided)

title: E-Commerce Supply Chain Ops Specialist – Replenishment, Inbound & Compliance
description:
We are a fast-growing Amazon FBA brand based in Germany, scaling across European marketplaces. Our team runs on clear processes, structured SOPs, and dedicated tools — and we are looking for someone who wants to own a key part of that engine.



As our Supply Chain Assistant, you take full ownership of replenishment planning, purchasing, inbound logistics, customs documents, and tool maintenance. VentoryOne is your primary system for reorder planning, purchase orders, and inventory tracking.



What makes this role different: you are not filling in spreadsheets for someone else. You run the supply chain. You build reorder recommendations, coordinate directly with suppliers in English, track shipments end-to-end, and keep data quality tight across the entire tool stack. Every process has a documented SOP — your job is to execute with precision, flag issues early, and improve what you touch.



This is a great fit if you enjoy structured work, take pride in accuracy, and want real ownership in a growing brand that trusts its people instead of micromanaging them.





What Success Looks Like



- Zero stockouts caused by late or missed reorder recommendations

- All purchase orders created, tracked, and closed in VentoryOne with correct status milestones

- Inbound shipments tracked end-to-end with documents filed in SharePoint under naming standards

- Weekly KPI snapshot delivered on time with accurate data (OOS risk, inbound status, open POs, cash flags, COGS status)

- Customs and compliance document packages complete and filed before deadlines

- COGS data in Sellerboard refreshed monthly with deviations flagged

- Bookkeeping documents prepared and exported on time for tax advisor (weekly cycle)

- Cashflow overview always current: open payments, due invoices, expected funds visible at a glance





Responsibilities



Replenishment and Purchasing

Monitor inventory levels daily in VentoryOne. Build reorder recommendations per supplier with quantities, timing, and risk assessment. Check co-ordering opportunities (MOQ, freight efficiency). Submit recommendations for approval, then create and track POs through all milestones.



Inbound and Logistics

Track shipments end-to-end: ETA, carrier, documents, status. Compare forwarder quotes. Prepare FBA inbound shipments (labels, carton content, shipment plans). Handle exceptions per SOP and verify goods received against packing lists.



Customs and Compliance

Collect and file document packages in SharePoint. Maintain HS codes and flag uncertainties. Run anti-dumping risk checks per checklist.



Tool Maintenance and Data Quality

Maintain master data across VentoryOne, Billbee, and Sellerboard. Keep COGS data current with monthly refresh cycles. Ensure consistent SKU naming, correct assignments, and flag discrepancies.



Bookkeeping Preparation and Cashflow

Collect, assign, and organize receipts and invoices for the tax advisor or DATEV export on a weekly basis. Maintain cashflow tracking: open payments, upcoming supplier invoices, and expected incoming funds. Update Commitly with payment entries and flag deviations. Prepare liquidity forecast data (open POs, planned orders, expected costs) for owner review. Ensure DATEV exports and bookkeeping documents are ready before deadlines.



KPI Support

Deliver a weekly KPI snapshot: OOS risk, inbound status, open POs, cash flags, COGS status. Data transfer and plausibility checks only, no interpretation.





Requirements: Must Have



- 2+ years experience in supply chain, purchasing, or inventory operations for an e-commerce or Amazon FBA business

- Hands-on experience with inventory or purchasing software (VentoryOne, Inventory Lab, SoStocked, or similar)

- Familiar with Amazon FBA inbound workflows: shipment plans, labels, carton content info

- Strong attention to detail in quantities, documents, and data entry

- Able to draft professional supplier
s in English

- Experience maintaining COGS or product cost data in tools like Sellerboard or VentoryOne

- Experience with bookkeeping preparation: organizing receipts, preparing exports for tax advisors, maintaining payment records

- Able to maintain a cashflow overview: tracking open payments, due invoices, and expected incoming funds

- Comfortable working with structured SOPs and checklists

- Reliable setup (stable internet, own laptop) and available during agreed overlap hours





Requirements: Nice to Have



- Experience with VentoryOne specifically

- Familiarity with Billbee, Sellerboard, or Amazon Seller Central

- Knowledge of customs documentation, HS codes, or anti-dumping regulations

- Experience with SharePoint or structured file management

- Basic understanding of freight forwarding and incoterms

- Experience with cashflow tools like Commitly or similar





Work Setup

This is a part-time role (20h/week) with a paid trial period and the clear goal of long-term employment. If it’s a good fit, compensation will increase over time. We are looking for a long-term team member and value a respectful, supportive, and close-knit work environment with a strong relationship built on trust.



- Hours per week: 20hours

- Duration: Unlimited

- Start date: April 2026

- Communication: Slack (async), weekly check-in call. All communication in English.

- Tools provided: VentoryOne, Sellerboard, Billbee, Commitly, SharePoint, Amazon Seller Central (view access as needed)





Decision Framework



Reorder recommendations: You build recommendations, check co-orders, prepare POs independently. Placing any order requires approval per supplier/PO.



Supplier communication: Standard follow-ups, packing list requests, ETA confirmations are independent. Price negotiations, new supplier onboarding, non-standard terms require approval.



Inbound and logistics: Shipment tracking, forwarder quote collection, FBA inbound prep are independent. Split shipment decisions, carrier changes, exception handling above SOP scope require approval.



Customs and compliance: Document collection, filing, lab test quote requests are independent. HS code final classification, anti-dumping escalation, lab test commissioning require approval.



Tool data: Master data maintenance, COGS updates, export creation are independent. Inventory corrections, rule changes in VentoryOne/Billbee require approval.



Budget and payments: Tracking payment due dates and preparing payment packages are independent. Any PO above [PLACEHOLDER: budget threshold], price deviation above [PLACEHOLDER: X%], shipping costs above [PLACEHOLDER: threshold] require approval.



Bookkeeping and cashflow: Receipt collection, DATEV export prep, Commitly updates, and cashflow overview maintenance are independent. Final sign-off on bookkeeping packages, liquidity decisions, payment prioritization, and forecast interpretation require approval.





IMPORTANT: Start your proposal with the word "VentoryOne" to confirm you have read the full description.

title: Sales Call Setter & Sales Management Career in 2026
description:
Who are we:



At Connex Partners, we’ve been redefining the intersection of advisory services and executive networks since 2006. As a concierge consultancy, we serve mid and large sized enterprise employers in the HR Space, and US healthcare providers, and the innovative solution partners that support them.



We are going to be rapidly expanding in 2026 - and we’re looking for several strategic, quick thinking consultative Sales Associates to join our remote team. Fully paid and ongoing sales and sales management training and development is provided. It's less important whether you have relevant sales experience or not, What we do look for is your character, the degree of career focus and motivation, how willing and able are you to be trained, can you quickly think and effectively act outside of the lines, and the fluency of your English in a B2B US setting.



What You’ll Do;



Conduct consultative outreach and sales calls to senior executives (B2B) from mid and larger sized US Businesses., initiating meaningful conversations that secure a sales appointment.

Listen to and Understand the clients and their specific pain points and position Connex's services as value-driven solutions.

Effectively and creatively use tools like Linked In for outreach

Collaborate with U.S.-based teams providing candid feedback to help refine your own sales messaging, improve the outreach processes and sales sequences to find new best sales and practices.

Continually learn, improve and grow and earn a lot more in 2026 than you did last year.



What We’re Looking For Individuals who have:



Fluent spoken and written English with a reasonably neutral accent

Ideally 1+ years of B2B selling experience in the US, Canada, UK ideally engaging C-level or VP-level stakeholders in larger business's

Strong critical and quick thinking ability. They can quickly read any situation and intuitively pivot to the smartest most optimal way of doing something.

Self confidence, grit, accountability, honesty , a positive disposition and humor.

A drive to have a career in sales or sales management and the ability to earn what they are really worth. They want to be promoted based solely on their skills, results and innate potential to be an excellent Manager or leader.

Enough self motivation that they excel with autonomy. They work incredibly hard not because they are being asked but because to seize this fantastic career opportunity they need to run their own race and not be slowed by others.



Compensation & Career Advancement :



$6-$10 USD/hour starting rate, with salary increases based on performance (3-12months)

Monthly Commissions & Bonuses + regular Performance Incentives

Full-time role with long-term growth potential

Rapid Managerial & leadership promotional opportunities (3-6 months)

Collaborative team culture where you still have real autonomy to totally manage your own time , earnings and career

Fully paid sales and sales management Training and Development

If you're energized by meaningful B2B conversations, you can think beyond scripts, and you want to be part of a company where you can truly control your own career and advancement destiny then - we immediately want to hear from you.

 to

 systems, and business applications

Knowledge of:

*
 troubleshooting (Outlook, Gmail)

What We’re Looking For

title: Amazon Wholesale Lead VA (KeHE) — QA + PO Builder + Reconciliation | Proof Required | Philippines Only
description:
The company I represent is launching a new Amazon Wholesale FBA store using KeHE as our supplier, and I’m looking for a VA who can run the first purchase order end-to-end with extreme accuracy. If successful, this can lead to a permanent position with promotion potential .





This is a proof-based operation (no guessing, no “looks good” picks). Every SKU must be validated with screenshots and fee-loaded math before we buy.



FIRST ORDER TARGET (NON-NEGOTIABLE)





Goal: Build and validate a KeHE PO that is:



$2,000–$2,200 total (minimum is $2,000; we include buffer for constrained items)



Shelf-stable only (no refrigerated/frozen)



No AOM items on PO #1 (AOM has longer lead times and uncertainty)



Designed to sell fast without price wars (Amazon is oversaturated; we need a defensible lane)



WHAT YOU WILL DELIVER (REQUIRED DELIVERABLES)





DELIVERABLE 1 — SKU SHORTLIST (Candidate Phase)





Create a shortlist of 25–40 candidates pulled from the KeHE data we provide.







For EACH candidate SKU you submit, you must include:







A) Core identifiers (must be accurate)

Product Name



UPC



KeHE item number (if available)



Pack size / case pack



Category (grocery / household / health etc.)



Item status in KeHE (ACTIVE only)







B) KeHE cost math (must be traceable)

Wholesale cost per unit



Promo / discount amount (if any)



Post-promo net cost per unit (show formula)



Notes if price is unclear or promo behaves oddly







C) Amazon validation (screenshots required)





You must attach screenshots (not just numbers) from:



Keepa



90–180 day price history chart



90–180 day BSR trend (must show stability, not spikes only)



Buy Box history (if visible)



SellerAmp or RevSeller



Fee estimate screenshot



ROI % screenshot



Net profit per unit screenshot







D) Competition + saturation screen





For each SKU, include:



of FBA sellers (estimate)

Is Amazon on the listing? (Yes/No)



Price war risk score: Low / Medium / High



Any red flags: heavy seller count, unstable buy box, collapsing price, etc.







E) Risk flags (Murphy control)





For each SKU, you must label:



Restriction / resale eligibility risk (Yes/No/Unknown)



Hazmat risk (Yes/No)



Melt/leak risk (Yes/No)



Fragile/break risk (Yes/No)



Expiration sensitivity (Yes/No)



Seasonal risk (Yes/No)



Return/defect risk (Low/Med/High)







If any risk is unknown ? you must flag it and explain what would confirm it.



DELIVERABLE 2 — FINAL PO BUILD (Execution Phase)





From the shortlist, you will select 7–15 winning SKUs and build a final PO that meets:







A) PO structure rules

Total KeHE spend: $2,000–$2,200



No single SKU should exceed 25–30% of total spend



At least:



60–70% “core velocity” items (stable demand, stable price)



20–30% “high margin” items (higher ROI but still stable)



0–10% “test” items (small qty only, controlled risk)



Include backup substitutes so if items are constrained, the PO still lands ?$2,000







B) PO summary sheet (one-page executive)





Provide a clean summary including:



Total cost



Total units



of SKUs

Expected net profit range AFTER fees (low / base / high)



Expected ROI range AFTER fees



Top 3 winners + why (bullet points)



Top 3 risks + how we mitigate them



DELIVERABLE 3 — “PROOF PACK” FOLDER (Required)





You will create a folder (Google Drive or zipped) containing:



Keepa screenshots for every final PO SKU



SellerAmp/RevSeller fee screenshots for every final PO SKU



A single spreadsheet linking each SKU ? its proof screenshots







No proof pack = no approval to buy.



DELIVERABLE 4 — “RECEIVING & CLAIMS PROTECTION” CHECKLIST





Because suppliers can be strict on credits/claims, you will provide a checklist for the first delivery:



What the 3PL must photograph



What to reconcile (PO vs invoice vs received)



What to flag immediately (damages, shorts, incorrect cases)



How to record delivery date proof







(This is to protect capital and prevent losses.)



HARD EXCLUSIONS (AUTO FAIL)





Do not include:



Refrigerated/frozen items



AOM-required items (for PO #1)



Products with unstable Keepa price history (collapsing)



Products where profit only exists before fees but is negative after fees



Anything that looks like a heavy price war or Amazon-dominated listing



TRIAL TEST (HOW YOU WILL BE GRADED)





You will be graded on:



Accuracy of math (?95% required)



Proof quality (screenshots, not estimates)



Risk awareness (you identify problems before we buy)



PO construction logic (balanced, defensible, reorder-ready)



BEFORE YOU CONFIRM, REPLY WITH THESE ANSWERS

Your hourly rate



Tools you use daily (Keepa, SellerAmp, RevSeller, etc.)



Your weekly availability + EST overlap



Can you deliver proof packs with screenshots for every SKU? (Yes/No)



Have you built real wholesale POs from distributor catalogs before? (Yes/No + brief example)







If you confirm the above, I’ll send:



our KeHE data file(s)



restricted/prohibited list



the PO template and scoring rules

title: Experienced Insurance Appointment Setter – US Life Insurance Leads (Full-Time, Night Shift)
description:
Hi! I'm a top-producing life insurance agent in the US and I need an experienced insurance appointment setter to join me long-term.



Here's the deal: I have over ten thousand aged life insurance leads sitting in my CRM ready to be called. I need someone to dial through them, have a quick friendly conversation, and either transfer the prospect to me live or book them on my calendar. You're not selling or quoting — just connecting me with interested people.



The products are Final Expense, Mortgage Protection, IUL, and Veterans life insurance. If you've set appointments for any of these before, we're going to get along great.



SCHEDULE:

9:00 AM – 8:00 PM US Eastern Time (Monday–Friday)

That's 9:00 PM – 8:00 AM Philippine time. Yes, it's a night shift. Please only apply if you're comfortable with that and have done it before.



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR:

- At least 1 year setting appointments specifically for US life insurance, Medicare, or financial services (this is required — general cold calling experience alone won't be enough)

- You already know what Final Expense, Mortgage Protection, or IUL means

- You've handled objections like "I already have insurance" and "I'm not interested" hundreds of times

- Clear English with a neutral accent (you'll be speaking with American seniors aged 50-80)

- Reliable internet, backup power, quiet workspace, and a good headset

- CRM or dialer experience is a plus (I use GoHighLevel and WAVV)



WHAT YOU GET:

- $6/hour base pay, paid every 2 weeks

- Bonuses on every qualified transfer and booked appointment

- Monthly performance bonus when you hit targets

- 13th month pay

- A long-term role — I'm not looking for a freelancer, I'm looking for a partner

- You'll have a massive lead pool to work with, so you'll never run out of people to call



I move fast. I'll be reviewing applications within 48 hours and starting interviews right away.



HOW TO APPLY:

Please include a 60-second voice recording with your application. Introduce yourself like you would to a Final Expense prospect, then tell me which insurance products you've set appointments for and what dialer/CRM you used. Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.



Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Social Media & Video Editor
description:
Part-Time - Full Time Social Media & Video Editor (Flexible Hours)

$3.50–$7/hr • Room to Grow, Bonuses for Performance and Paid Time Off



Hello! 



We are a 15 year old direct to consume ecommerce website in the nature niche. 



We are looking for someone creative and reliable to help us create and post content for social media.



This role focuses on editing simple videos, creating graphics in Canva, and posting content on social platforms.  We are primarily on
 and Instagram, but would ideally like to grow our Youtube channel, so bonus points if you have experience there or with Pinterest. 



This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys creative work and wants a flexible remote job with room to grow.



What You'll Do



• Edit simple videos for YouTube, Instagram, and short-form clips

• Create social media graphics using Canva

• Turn one piece of content into multiple posts

• Schedule or prepare posts for social media

• Help us keep a steady flow of content going out each week



Most content will already be roughly planned timeline wise — your job is to help turn ideas into polished posts.



This Job Is a Great Fit If You



• Enjoy editing videos

• Have experience with Canva or simple design tools

• Are organized and detail oriented

• Can follow instructions and brand guidelines

• Can work independently without constant supervision

• Have successfully run social media for a D2C ecommerce store before 





Hours & Flexibility



During the training period, we will ask you to work some hours during EST (US time) so we can communicate easily.



After that, your schedule can be flexible as long as your tasks are completed.



This role may start part-time, but could grow into more hours for the right person.



Pay



$4–$7 per hour depending on experience.

**There is room for growth and higher pay as the role grows or you take on more responsiblity**



How to Apply (Very Simple)

1?? How many hours per week you are looking for

3?? A link to your resume

4?? A link to examples of your work (portfolio)

title: Finance Manager
description:
Job Title: Finance & Payroll Manager

Role Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented and strategic Finance & Payroll Manager to oversee our financial health and ensure our team is paid accurately and on time. You will be responsible for the full accounting cycle, from processing bi-weekly payroll and managing tax compliance to preparing monthly financial statements and advising leadership on budget management.



Key Responsibilities

1. Payroll & Compliance



Execute end-to-end payroll processing for all employees (salary, hourly, and commissions).



Manage tax withholdings, benefits deductions, 401(k) contributions, and workers' compensation.



Stay updated on local, state, and federal labor laws to ensure total compliance.



Act as the primary point of contact for employee inquiries regarding pay and benefits.



2. Financial Management & Reporting



Maintain the general ledger and oversee Accounts Payable (AP) and Accounts Receivable (AR).



Perform monthly bank reconciliations and lead the month-end/year-end closing process.



Prepare accurate financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) for ownership/leadership.



Manage cash flow forecasting to ensure the company meets all operational obligations.



3. Strategy & Oversight



Develop and monitor annual department budgets.



Identify opportunities for cost savings and process improvements.



Coordinate with external CPAs for annual tax filings and audits.



Required Skills & Qualifications

Experience: 5+ years in accounting or finance, with at least 2 years specifically managing payroll.



Education: Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (CPA or CMA is a plus).



Software: Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Xero, Sage) and payroll platforms (e.g., Gusto, ADP, Rippling).



Expertise: Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, VLOOKUPs) and a deep understanding of GAAP (Generally Accepted Accounting Principles).



Traits: Absolute integrity, high level of discretion for sensitive data, and a "no-task-too-small" attitude.



Why This Role Matters

In this position, you aren't just "cutting checks." You are the guardian of our company’s financial integrity. Your work ensures that our employees are supported and that our leadership has the data they need to grow the business sustainably.

title: Marketing Master
description:

The ideal candidate is a "full-stack" marketer—someone who understands the technical side of digital growth but also has a keen eye for creative storytelling.

Content & Brand Voice: Maintain a consistent brand identity across all platforms; oversee the creation of high-quality copy, video, and design assets.

 marketing automation (HubSpot, Marketo, or Mailchimp), and paid social (Meta, LinkedIn, Google Ads).

description:
