title: EXPERIENCED VIDEO EDITOR - Fully Remote
description:
*** Please read the application fully before applying. ***



ABOUT US



We are a female-led coaching business that has taught over 2,000 women a high-income and life-changing skill - empowering them to launch a new and exciting career. 

Over the last 3 years our team has grown to 50+ people -  we move fast, test bold ideas, and are on a mission to reach even more women with life-changing skills.





THE ROLE



We’re looking for an experienced video editor to own our visual content from start to finish. 



** Your core responsibilities will include:



- Editing full-length YouTube videos (talking-head and tutorial formats - with some animations, B-roll, transitions) for our founder/creator

- Producing short-form video ads for paid advertising campaigns

- Creating engaging Instagram Reels and social content



You’ll have creative freedom to pitch new ideas, experiment with trending formats, and continuously raise the bar on quality.





REQUIREMENTS



*** Technical Skills

- Minimum 2 years of professional video editing experience

- Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects (non-negotiable)

- Confident with colour correction, audio cleanup, and mixing

- Strong graphic design eye - typography, lower thirds, transitions, and motion graphics

- Skilled at selecting music and sound effects that elevate the final product

- Ability to seamlessly integrate B-roll with smooth, polished transitions

- Sharp sense of pacing, timing, and narrative flow





*** Experience & Background

- Proven track record editing talking-head YouTube content for business owners, creators, or educators/ gurus

- Familiarity with current YouTube and short-form social media trends

- Fluent in written and spoken English

- Bonus: if you have advertising or “direct response” knowledge and/or experience





*** Technical Setup

- A high-spec computer capable of handling 4K video editing workflows

- Fast, stable internet for downloading large files (backup connection is a plus)





ABOUT YOU



- Organised, efficient, and consistently deliver high-quality work

- Detail-oriented with strong self-review habits - but not afraid to ask for feedback or learn from mistakes

- Proactive and curious - you stay on top of editing trends, experiment with new techniques (effects, animation, motion graphics), and bring fresh ideas to the table

- Ready to commit to a full-time role and grow with a fast-moving team





COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS



Salary: PHP 40,000 – 70,000 per month (based on experience & skillset)

Schedule: Monday to Friday, Philippine timezone

Growth: Access to professional development opportunities including courses, coaching, and resources





HOW TO APPLY



We’re hiring immediately. 



If this sounds like the right fit, complete the application form below. Important: To confirm you’ve read this listing carefully and pay attention to details, please add the word “orange” after your name in the application.



APPLY HERE ONLY:

 marketing agency, this could be a great fit.



This role is very focused: you’ll be working inside Klaviyo, testing and improving
 performance across multiple Shopify brands.



Not a strategy-heavy or client-facing role. No endless meetings. Just testing, learning, and improving.



What you’ll be doing:



- Running A/B tests on
 campaigns and flows

- Testing small but impactful elements (subject lines, preview text, send times) to improve open rates

- Helping redesign
 templates to test and improve conversion rates

- Improving
 structure and layout to increase click-through rates

- Analyzing results and clearly documenting insights

- Sharing structured learnings so the team can communicate results to clients



What we’re looking for:



- Someone who enjoys testing and optimizing (this is the core of the role)

- Experience with Klaviyo (or similar ESP)

- Basic understanding of
 performance metrics (open rate, CTR, conversion rate)

- Detail-oriented and structured in how you work

- Able to clearly explain why something worked (not just what worked)



Nice to have:



- Shopify experience

- Basic CRO mindset

- Experience with
 design or template structure



How we work:



- Start part-time (~10 to 20 hours/week)

- Potential to grow into a bigger role over time

- Flexible, no corporate structure

- Minimal meetings, high ownership



If things go well, there’s room to grow into a broader role, including:



- Flow optimization

-
 structure strategy

- Checking and improving full Klaviyo setups

title: WordPress Developer Contractor (Expert Level)
description:
We are an Australian e-commerce business operating a custom-built WordPress platform, and we’re seeking an experienced, highly independent WordPress Developer to support and extend our site on an ongoing, task-based basis.

This is a senior technical role suited to someone confident working with custom WordPress architectures, legacy codebases, and new development with minimal supervision.



Engagement Type:

Contractor - 40hrs per week



Availability & Responsiveness (Important):

Must be contactable and responsive during Australian business hours (9am–5pm AEST)

Exact start/finish times can be flexible, but availability and responsiveness are essential



Responsibilities:

WordPress technical support and ongoing maintenance

Troubleshooting and resolving site issues

Working with and improving existing PHP-based implementations

Refactoring and modernising parts of the platform over time

Implementing ad-hoc feature requests and updates

Contributing to new development as required

Working within a custom WordPress architecture



Required Skills & Experience:

Please only apply if you meet the majority of the following:

Expert-level WordPress development experience

Strong PHP skills (comfortable reading, modifying, and improving existing code)

Solid HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

Experience working with custom themes and non-standard WordPress builds

Confident debugging and problem-solving in live environments

Ability to work independently and manage tasks without constant oversight

Minimum 3 years professional WordPress experience

(5+ years strongly preferred)



Highly Regarded (Bonus Skills):

Experience working with APIs

Familiarity with CRM integrations, automation, or third-party system integrations

Experience working with Australian or similar time-zone teams

Version control (Git)

Performance and security best practices



Pay:

USD $8/hour

Negotiable for exceptional experience

Paid hourly on a contractor basis

Please only apply if you are comfortable with this rate.



Application Requirements:

To be considered, all of the following are required:

Short video (1–2 minutes max)

Who you are

Your relevant experience

Examples of the type of WordPress work you’ve done

Short written statement addressing how you meet the selection criteria

Up-to-date CV

References (must be provided)

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



About Us:

We are an established Australian e-commerce business running a custom WordPress platform. Our work involves a mix of ongoing support, platform improvements, and new development, and we value reliability, clear communication, and technical competence.

title: Graphic Design & Marketing Assistant (Junior / Graduate)
description:
We are an Australian-based eCommerce business seeking a junior or graduate Graphic Design & Marketing Assistant to join our remote team in the Philippines.



This is a support-focused, entry-level role. The tasks themselves are straightforward, however the role requires exceptional organisation, accuracy, and the ability to follow documented procedures.



ABOUT THE ROLE

You will support our marketing and website operations by completing clearly defined tasks according to established processes.

Key responsibilities include:

-Preparing and resizing images using Canva

-Preparing documents such as PDF catalogues

-Uploading images and content to our WordPress website

-Exceptionally organised file management, including storing and maintaining files on our SharePoint server

-Following step-by-step procedures exactly

-Providing a daily written report outlining work completed

-Please note: file organisation and structure is a major part of this role. Precision and consistency are critical.



REQUIRED SKILLS & ATTRIBUTES

-Exceptional organisational skills (essential)

-Exceptional ability to follow procedures (essential)

-Strong written and spoken English communication

-Confidence using Canva for basic design tasks

-Comfortable working with shared drives, folders, and file naming conventions

-Reliable, detail-oriented, and accountable



DESIERABLE SKILLS

-Familiarity with WordPress

-Experience working with CMS websites



WordPress experience is helpful but not required. If you understand the fundamentals of CMS websites and are confident these skills can transfer, we encourage you to apply. 



FUTURE OPPORTUNITIES

For the right long-term candidate, there may be opportunities to expand into social media support in the future.

This is a bonus opportunity only and will be considered once the core responsibilities of the role are consistently met.



WORKING HOURS & EXPECTATIONS

-Full-time: 8 hours per day

-You must be responsive during Australian Eastern Time business hours (9am–5pm AEST)

-Specific start and finish times can be discussed, provided responsiveness and full daily hours are met

-Daily written reporting is mandatory



PAY

-USD $2–$3 per hour, depending on skills and experience

-Opportunities for review and increase for strong, long-term performers



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, please submit all of the following:



-A short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

Tell us who you are

Briefly explain why you are interested in this role

This helps us assess communication skills and professionalism



-A cover letter that addresses the selection criteria listed above

Where possible, provide examples of how you have demonstrated these skills in previous roles, studies, or projects

This may include examples of:

File organisation systems you have used

Following documented procedures

Working with CMS websites

Clear written communication



Bonus points if you include the phrase “I follow procedures” somewhere in your cover letter.



Applications that do not include both a video and a cover letter will not be considered.

mbers who take initiative and want to grow.

title: Fanfiction/webnovels writer
description:
what I'm looking for is someone capable and fluent in english and excels at writing stories, more specifically, writing fanfiction/webnovels about anime like Naruto, Bleach, Fairy Tail, Solo Leveling, Dragon Ball Super, Classroom of the elite, Fate/Stay night, etc... the person shouldn't just be good in writing in english, but should excel at writing stories that make readers gasp in awe, and the writer I'm looking for should also be familiar with animes in general. 



Someone experinced in writing fanfiction is what I'm looking for, someone who can write multiple stories a month, we're looking at least 4-6chapters, preferably more but I can be flexible if it's only around 4-6 chapters that can be written. Generally I have no limits, if you are able to write around only 4-6 chapters, that's acceptable, if you can write 15 or 20 chapters, that's great. Each chapter should be around
words. But even if you can do that,I will not accept anyone using A.I like chatgpt to help them with writing.



What I want is honest natural talent. so If I detect any A.I, then there's no collaboration.



If you are fluent with english, familiar with anime like the ones mentioned, are very good in writing stories, can write at least 4 chapters a month (with each chapter being around
words) and you're a natural (meaning without the help of A.I), I'd love to have you on board.



The pay is based on number of chapters written, each chapter having a worth of $25, if you write twenty chapters a month, you'll get a $500 in total. if you write six chapters a month, then it would $150, etc... 



I look forward to having you on board.

title: Content Creation & Design Specialist
description:
The Content Creation & Design Specialist is responsible for developing and executing high-quality visual and written marketing materials that support brand positioning and business objectives. This role combines creative design, content production, digital marketing, and stakeholder coordination, with a strong focus on delivering compelling campaigns within the tourism industry.







Key Responsibilities



1. Content Creation & Design



Design and produce a wide range of marketing collateral, including banners, social media graphics, flyers, brochures, and advertisements across multiple formats using Canva and similar tools

Ensure all creative assets align with brand guidelines and are tailored to specific platforms and target audiences

Conceptualize and execute innovative marketing campaigns that enhance brand visibility and engagement





2. Video Production & Editing



Edit and produce engaging video content for social media, websites, and promotional use using CapCut and other editing tools

Manage the end-to-end video production process, including briefing, asset sourcing, editing, and final delivery

Develop both short-form content (e.g., Reels, Stories) and long-form promotional videos

Support
 marketing campaigns, including content creation, scheduling, and performance tracking





3. Document Creation & Content Development



Produce professional marketing materials such as proposals, media kits, capability statements, and partner briefs

Contribute to the design and content of websites, blogs, and other digital platforms

Maintain consistency in brand voice, tone, and messaging across all written communications

4. Partner & Stakeholder Management



Source, engage, and manage relationships with external partners, including photographers, videographers, and content creators

Coordinate content production, asset delivery, and quality control with third-party suppliers

Negotiate content licensing and usage rights

Collaborate with tourism boards, industry organizations, and co-marketing partners on joint campaigns

Act as a liaison between the marketing team and internal departments





5. File & Asset Management



Maintain a structured and accessible digital asset management (DAM) system for all marketing materials

Implement and uphold file naming conventions, version control, and archiving processes

Ensure timely availability and distribution of assets to relevant stakeholders





6. Social Media & Community Management



Manage and grow the company’s presence across social media platforms, including Instagram,
, LinkedIn, and others

Develop and maintain a content calendar to ensure consistent posting

Monitor engagement, respond to audience interactions, and manage community relationships

Track and report on social media performance metrics, providing insights for continuous improvement





Qualifications & Skills



Proven experience in graphic design and content creation

Proficiency in Canva and video editing tools such as CapCut

Strong understanding of social media platforms and digital marketing trends

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Strong organizational and project management abilities

Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines

Experience in tourism, hospitality, or lifestyle marketing is an advantage





Key Competencies



Creativity and attention to detail

Strategic thinking and problem-solving

Strong collaboration and interpersonal skills

Adaptability and initiative

Results-driven mindset

Set up Zoho CRM workflows, assignments, and automated follow-up
s

Automate
 reminders and follow-ups

Connect systems using basic APIs or webhooks



Troubleshoot automation issues



Document tasks and systems clearly



REQUIRED SKILLS

Zapier



ClickUp



Zoho CRM



Writing simple code/scripts (Python or JavaScript)



AI tools like GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity



Basic web scraping



Google Sheets / Google Workspace

Basic API knowledge



 automation tools



Applicants without real experience will not be reviewed.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Reliable and consistent



Organized and detail-oriented



Able to follow instructions



Can work independently



Good communication



Problem-solver without overcomplicating things



Not for beginners.



SALARY



Part-Time:

$300 – $600 per month (up to $900 based on skill and performance)



Full-Time:

Completed automation projects



Monthly consistency



Special tech assignments



Salary review every 3–6 months.



HOURS PER WEEK

HOW TO APPLY

title: Social Media Assistant
description:

We’re looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with a genuine interest in combat sports (boxing, MMA, UFC, etc.) to manage engagement across multiple social media accounts.



This role focuses on daily interaction and community growth, not content creation or posting.

) Account

title: Part-Time WordPress Website Manager
description:
We are looking for a reliable WordPress Website Manager to help maintain and update our company website.



This is an ongoing part-time role focused on site maintenance, updates, and minor improvements. You will not be building large websites from scratch, but rather helping ensure our existing site runs smoothly and stays up to date.



Responsibilities



• Update WordPress plugins, themes, and core files  

• Perform regular website maintenance and health checks  

• Monitor and resolve plugin conflicts or errors  

• Ensure the website remains secure and up to date  

• Make minor design or layout adjustments when needed  

• Create or duplicate pages using our existing templates  

• Upload blog posts or new content when required  

• Optimize page speed and performance where possible  

• Ensure the website functions properly on mobile and desktop  



Requirements



• Experience working with WordPress websites  

• Basic knowledge of HTML and CSS for small adjustments  

• Ability to troubleshoot common WordPress issues  

• Good attention to detail  

• Strong communication and reliability  



Nice to Have



• Experience with website speed optimization  

• Familiarity with website backups and security tools  



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys maintaining and improving existing websites rather than building them from scratch.



We are looking for someone dependable who can work with us to keep our website running smoothly.



To confirm you read this job post, please begin your application with the word “Evergreen.”

title: Video Editor for E-Commerce Product Ads (AI-Generated Content)
description:
We're a growing e-commerce brand looking for a skilled video editor to assemble short-form video ads (1-2 minutes) for
/Instagram.



What makes this role unique: You won't need to shoot anything. All raw material — AI-generated video clips, B-roll footage and product shots — will be provided to you in an organized Google Drive folder. Scripts and voiceover text will also be provided.



Your job:

• Assemble provided video clips into polished, scroll-stopping ads

• Add clean subtitles/captions (word-by-word style, bold, readable)

• Sync clips to voiceover/narration timing

• Basic transitions between clips



What we're looking for:

• Experience editing short-form video ads 
, TikTok, Instagram)

• Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

• Clean subtitle/caption styling (not generic auto-captions)

• Fast turnaround — we'll be testing many ad variations

• Good eye for pacing, cuts, and keeping viewer attention

• Reliable communication 



Nice to have (not required):

• Experience with e-commerce/DTC brand ads

• Understanding of direct response ad structure (hook ? story ? CTA)

• Basic motion graphics (simple overlays, zoom effects)



This starts as a part-time role at 10-15 hours/week while we test fit and workflow. But here's the thing — once everything clicks, we're ready to scale hard. We have the systems to produce a high volume of ad variations, and we need an editor who can grow with us. If you're fast, reliable, and deliver clean work, this can quickly become 30-40+ hours/week. The more you can handle, the more we'll send your way.

title: Website & SEO Strategist
description:
Role Overview:



In this hybrid role, you will be responsible for both the SEO strategy and the development of high-converting, user-friendly WordPress websites. You will collaborate closely with content creators, marketing teams, and business stakeholders to improve search rankings, drive traffic, and optimize user journeys.



Key Responsibilities:



Conduct in-depth keyword research and on-page optimization to improve search rankings and visibility.



Write compelling meta descriptions, title tags, and H1 headings grounded in user psychology and search intent.



Develop and maintain responsive WordPress websites with a focus on speed, user experience, and mobile optimization.



Integrate and configure Google Search Console, Google Analytics, and Google Site Kit to track performance and gather insights.



Perform regular SEO audits, ensuring technical SEO standards are met (site speed, schema markup, etc.).



Implement structured data and schema to improve rich results and snippet visibility.



Collaborate on A/B testing for conversions and ensure the design aligns with SEO best practices.



Stay up-to-date with search engine algorithm changes and apply insights proactively to maintain and improve rankings.



Qualifications:



3+ years of experience in SEO and web development, particularly with WordPress.



Proven track record of ranking websites on Google’s first page and optimizing for conversion.



Deep knowledge of SEO tools: Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Google Site Kit, and SEO audit tools (e.g., Ahrefs, SEMrush).



Strong understanding of user experience (UX) and conversion-focused web design.



Excellent communication skills to explain SEO concepts to non-technical stakeholders.



Ability to manage multiple projects, meet deadlines, and collaborate with cross-functional teams.



Nice-to-Haves:



Experience with e-commerce SEO or licensing-based businesses.



Familiarity with voice search optimization or emerging SEO trends.



Experience in developing or managing a music catalog or media-related platform.



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume, portfolio (showcasing past SEO and web projects), and a brief cover letter explaining why you’re the ideal fit for this role.

title: Account/HR
description:
HR Support/Accounts/Bookkeeper



Maintain day-to-day bookkeeping in QuickBooks (invoices, receipts, payments).

Reconcile bank accounts, prepare month-end reports (P&L, balance sheet).

Support payroll entries, tax filings, and audits.

Requirements: 2+ years accounting experience, proficient in QuickBooks and Excel.

HR & Payroll Officer (QuickBooks/Sprout)



Manage recruitment, onboarding, employee records, and HR compliance.

Prepare payroll data and process or record payroll transactions in QuickBooks.

Produce HR reports (headcount, leave, turnover) and manage benefits administration.

Requirements: 2+ years HR experience, working knowledge of QuickBooks and local labor laws.

title: Virtual Medical Receptionist / Administrative Support
description:
Core Role:

>Answer incoming calls professionally for a small US medical office, take accurate messages, handle basic patient inquiries, and book appointments using our scheduling system (training provided). Low-to-moderate call volume with time to work on side projects.



>Note: Spanish speaking required.



What Makes This Role Dynamic:

>Indefinite Long-Term Position — This is a lasting role with real room for growth and impact.

>Fulfilling & Varied — Far from monotonous call-grinding; enjoy meaningful variation, good challenges, personal satisfaction, and the chance to contribute more as you grow.

>Training & Development — No prior medical experience required if you're eager to learn. We'll provide training on everything needed.

>Growth Potential — Start with phones and booking, then expand into chart preparation, insurance verification, scribing, website updates, basic SEO, or other tasks based on your skills, interests, and performance. The more value you add, the more responsibilities—and pay—you'll earn.



Compensation:

>$5–$8 USD per hour (depending on experience and skills), paid hourly. Pay may increase significantly over time based on skills learned, responsibilities taken on, and your overall impact.



Requirements:

>Excellent English communication (clear, professional phone manner preferred)

>Spanish speaking (on possible occasions)

>Comfortable using or quickly learning VoIP tools (e.g., Nextiva—training provided)

>Reliable high-speed internet and quiet workspace with a good headset

>Independent mindset: Proactive problem-solver who can work effectively with available tools and minimal direction (while still receiving guidance and support).

title: Video Editor of Interviews
description:
Looking for a great video editor, preferably strong with Sony Vegas editing software (but not critical.).  I send you the raw video via dropbox - you pick the best scenes and compile a nice clean video under 90 seconds.  In some cases, I may need you to produce 2 videos or even 3 - all from the same raw tape interview which I can dropbox to you.  



These videos are all taken from interviews videotaped on a local radio show.  You will also need to add my intro and extro to the finished video you send back to me and they need a lower third.  See examples below.



Please reply as soon as possible stating your turnaround time for each video (after you receive raw) and your best rate per video.  Could be continuous work if youre really good and great rate!  If you have anything similar youve produced in the past, send me youtube link example.  DO NOT SEND ME any music videos or unrelated video - only video that may be similar to what I am describing.



Example 1: 

https://youtu.be/9l3gSidXtjY



Example 2: 

https://youtu.be/mWVBCUUGTeo



Example 3:

https://youtu.be/VD5jkSC8jdI

title: Urgent : Social Media Manager ( travel related )
description:
Company Overview



We are a dynamic and rapidly growing travel company dedicated to providing unparalleled travel experiences across the diverse and enchanting continent of Europe. We are seeking a structured Social Media Manager to join our team and play a key role in shaping our online presence.



Position Overview



As the Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for developing and executing a comprehensive social media strategy to enhance our brand visibility, engage our audience, and drive customer loyalty. This role offers a unique opportunity to contribute to the growth of a vibrant company while immersing yourself in the wonders of European travel.



Responsibilities



Implement management’s social media strategy aligned with business goals and brand identity.



Create, schedule, and post social media content across various platforms, including but not limited to TikTok,
, Instagram, YouTube, and X.



Curate engaging, informative, and shareable content that highlights the beauty, culture, and experiences offered by the company.



Coordinate and review the creation of new content from a team of freelance content creators.



Daily engagement with followers across social media platforms to expand reach, impact, and generate sales.



Analyze social media metrics and assess the effectiveness of the strategy and content.



Regular alignment with the Social Media Ads Manager.



Stay up-to-date with social media platform changes and updates, implementing new features to enhance online presence.



Qualifications



Proven experience as a Social Media Manager or similar role, preferably in the travel and tourism industry.

Strong understanding of social media platforms, algorithms, and best practices.

Exceptional writing, editing, and communication skills in English.

Good eye for detail and aesthetics.

Ability to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and meet deadlines.

Highly structured and skilled at coordinating people and providing feedback.

Proven ability to create innovative and engaging video content is a plus but not required.



Requirements



Demonstrated success in growing and engaging social media audiences.

Passion for travel, culture, and the European experience.

Strong organizational and project management skills.

Proficiency in editing tools (e.g., CapCut) is a plus.



How to Apply





If you are enthusiastic about the world of travel, possess a creative flair, and have a proven track record in social media management, we would love to hear from you. As part of your application, please submit your resume and include details of your work experience as a social media manager within the travel industry, including any relevant campaigns or projects you have handled to

title: Junior Underwriting Analyst
description:
Junior Underwriting Analyst



Role Overview

We are hiring a Junior Underwriting Analyst to prepare accurate and well-organized underwriting packages for senior risk leadership. This role focuses on financial statement review, data verification, and documentation, not final credit decisions.



Core Responsibilities

Collect and organize financial documents (financials, bank data, tax returns, A/R & A/P aging)

Review balance sheets, P&Ls, and cash flow statements

Calculate key metrics (Revenue, EBITDA, margins, debt ratios, ROAS, CAC/LTV)

Ensure data accuracy across systems

Prepare underwriting packages using templates

Coordinate with Account Executives for missing documents

Track progress in CRM tools

Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

3–5 years experience in fintech, banking, or credit card industry

Direct underwriting or credit analysis experience

Experience reviewing borrower financials in lending

Knowledge of risk ratings, credit limits, KYC/KYB, and compliance

Applicants without underwriting experience will not be considered.

Preferred

Graduate of Finance, Accountancy, or related field

Strong financial statement literacy

Ideal Background

E-commerce lending, merchant cash advance, or commercial credit experience; familiarity with ROAS, CAC, and LTV.



Apply: Send your resume to

title: Estimator
description:
Estimator required for structural steel, metal work and architectural fabricator based in Melbourne, Australia. We service the construction and infrastructure industry. 



As estimator, your tasks are to:

- Review engineering drawings and specifications

- Prepare accurate material take-offs for structural steel

- Prepare accurate material take-offs for metal work

- Prepare accurate material take-offs for architectural works



You will have:

- Proven experience in estimating or quantity take-offs within steel fabrication, construction, or related industry

- Strong ability to read and interpret structural and shop drawings

- Experience with take-off and estimating software (e.g. Bluebeam, PlanSwift, or similar)

- Solid understanding of steel fabrication processes (cutting, welding, finishing, installation)

- High level of accuracy and attention to detail

title: Social Media Manager AND/OR Video Editor
description:
I am looking for a social media manager that can do the following below. PLEASE only submit if you can provide exceptional work for either job 1, job 2, OR both. I am not choosing based if you can do all but rather your work, expertise, and ability to follow directions and be communicative. I would prefer to have 2 or 3 separate professionals who are amazing at their niche than to have 1 person who is okay at all. Please put in your application "WINE" first before applying so I know you are reading this with intention and to ensure you pay attention to detail.

title: Experienced Video Editor (Short-Form + Occasional Ads & Long-Form)
description:
We’re looking for an experienced video editor who will become a true extension of our brand — not just someone who cuts clips, but someone who understands storytelling, retention, and brand tone.

About Us

The Role

Bonus if you:

Engagement Structure

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Direct Response Video Editor
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



Build the creative engine behind performance.



Portent Brands is a holding company scaling a portfolio of healthcare and ecommerce brands through performance creative and paid growth. We build brands that win at the unit economics level—and great creative is central to how we do it.





As our DTC Video Editor, you’ll own the full lifecycle of paid video creative across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and Google. You’ll work directly with our Creative Lead and Head of Growth—taking briefs from concept to final ad independently, then iterating fast based on what the data says.





This isn’t a brand-only role. Performance, output velocity, and creative precision are the metrics that matter here. You’ll use AI tools to compress production timelines, leverage motion design to elevate hooks, and bring a direct-response instinct to every cut.





Over time, you’ll become a core creative engine across Growth, CRO, and Product—shaping how our brands convert at scale.





WHAT YOU’LL DO



Own the output. Drive the numbers.



DTC Video Editing: Edit and ship conversion-focused video ads for Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and Google. Every cut has a performance objective.

Motion Design: Build sharp animations and motion graphics that reinforce hooks, brand identity, and storytelling clarity.

Creative Variations: Produce fast, high-quality iterations across hooks, angles, formats, pacing, and lengths to fuel continuous testing.

AI-Powered Production: Actively use AI video, voice, image, and asset generation tools to move from concept to finished ad in hours—not days.

Data-Driven Editing: Review performance metrics (thumb-stop rate, hold rate, CTR, ROAS) and translate insights directly into creative decisions.

A/B Testing: Run structured creative experiments and iterate quickly based on results.

Optimization: Continuously sharpen pacing, copy overlays, hooks, captions, structure, sound design, and visual clarity.

Trend Awareness: Stay current on paid social trends, platform best practices, and emerging editing and AI tools.





WHAT YOU BRING



Skills that ship.



Experience: 3+ years editing high-performing DTC paid social ads. Strong portfolio of Meta and TikTok creatives required.

Editing Tools: Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro, Capcut, Davinci Resolve. Solid working knowledge of After Effects and Photoshop.

Motion Design: Strong command of animation, typography, transitions, sound design, pacing, color, and visual storytelling.

Performance Mindset: You understand what makes a direct-response ad work—hooks, clarity, messaging hierarchy, pacing, and CTA structure.

AI Fluency: Comfortable using AI tools daily as part of your production stack, not as a novelty.

Output Velocity: Able to manage multiple edits simultaneously, hit deadlines, and sustain high-quality output at scale.

Captions & Copy: Writes and applies accurate, compelling English captions that reinforce messaging and hooks.

Execution: Takes a brief to final cut independently. Moves fast without losing craft.

Ownership: Finds what’s missing, fixes it, and keeps work moving without being asked.

Collaboration: Works fluidly with the team. Takes direct feedback and turns it around fast.

AI Video Tools: Hands-on experience with AI-native video editing or automation tools.

Creative Strategy: Familiarity with direct-response creative frameworks, hook testing, and angle development.

Industry: Experience with DTC, healthcare, wellness, or weight-loss brands.

High-Volume Teams: Background in high-throughput creative environments where output volume is tied directly to performance.





NICE TO HAVE



Bonus points.



Industry: Experience with DTC, healthcare, wellness, or weight-loss brands.





Compensation:

Base salary of $1,250 per month. 

Performance incentive based on creative performance

title: Marketing and Creative Executive
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a Marketing and Creative Executive to support marketing and brand efforts through strong design execution, creative judgement, and asset management. This role oversees the development and quality of marketing assets, content, and videos, ensuring consistency, clarity, and good creative taste across all brand touchpoints.



This is a hands-on role focused on execution and quality control. You will work closely with leadership, while owning the day-to-day creation and upkeep of marketing materials.



Key Responsibilities

Creative Execution and Brand Consistency

Execute and maintain brand's visual standards across all marketing materials

Ensure consistency in layout, typography, colour usage, and overall presentation

Apply strong creative judgement when developing or refining assets



Design and Asset Development

Design pitch decks, pricing PDFs, proposals, and marketing assets

Use Canva as the primary tool for decks and collaborative assets

Use professional design software where appropriate to develop or refine assets

Maintain and improve templates to increase speed without compromising quality



Content and Video Oversight

Support and review marketing content across social, website, and outbound channels

Quality-check videos and visual assets used for marketing purposes

Coordinate with internal editors, designers, and external vendors as needed



Marketing Support and Systems

Support sales and leadership with clear, well-designed materials

Help organise and maintain a clean, accessible marketing asset library

Manage tasks and feedback through ClickUp and related tools



Requirements

Must-Have

Strong visual taste and attention to detail

Experience in design, branding, or creative marketing roles

Proficiency in Canva for pitch decks and marketing assets

Working proficiency in professional design software such as Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, Photoshop, or equivalent

Ability to take feedback, iterate quickly, and work independently in a remote setup



Nice-to-Have

Agency or production industry experience

Familiarity with video or motion content

Basic understanding of marketing or sales support workflows





What Success Looks Like in the First 6 Months

Marketing and pitch assets are consistently clean, clear, and on-brand

Reduced rework on decks and materials before client-facing use

Faster turnaround of assets with steady improvement in quality

Leadership confidence in day-to-day marketing execution

title: Creative Short-Form Video Editor
description:
We’re looking for a creative short-form video editor who lives and breathes modern content.



This role is for a fast-growing Company Brand. We are not creating traditional ads. We are creating viral, hook-driven short-form content designed to stop the scroll and build attention at scale.



You need to understand what makes people watch.



We want someone on the cutting edge of short-form trends. Someone who studies what works. Someone who cares deeply about hooks, retention, pacing, subtitles, pattern interrupts, and storytelling.



If you have experience creating high-performing ads or working with big brands on UGC content, that is a huge plus. But this role is about virality and attention, not corporate-style editing.



You should understand how to craft powerful hooks in the first one to three seconds. You should know how to structure short-form content for maximum retention. You should be confident with captions, sound design, pacing, and dynamic edits. You should stay up to date with TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts trends. Most importantly, you should want to constantly improve and test new ideas.



We are looking for someone who wants to grow long term and be part of building something big. There will be consistent work for the right person.



To apply, you must complete the Google Form below. Only applicants who complete the form will be considered.



Application Form: 



If you are serious about building viral content and pushing your editing skills to the next level, apply now.

title: Scale 77
description:
We are a fast-growing med spa patient acquisition agency based in the US, and we are looking for a sharp, technically savvy VA to join our team part-time with real potential to grow into a full-time role as we scale.

This is not your average VA role. We need someone who genuinely loves figuring things out, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and can jump between platforms and tasks without missing a beat. If you get excited when you encounter a new piece of software and your first instinct is to figure it out rather than ask for help, this role is for you.

What You Will Be Doing

Your primary responsibility will be building out client backends. This includes setting up GoHighLevel (GHL) sub-accounts, configuring HotProspector dialing accounts, and handling calendar integrations across multiple clients. Each client has a different setup, different software, and a different way of doing things, so no two days will look the same.

Beyond that, you will own the technical side of our operations. If something breaks, if a new integration needs to be built, or if a workflow needs to be fixed, that lands on your plate. You will be our go-to person for anything tech-related until we build out a more structured team around you.

Core Responsibilities



Build and configure GHL sub-accounts for new and existing clients

Set up and manage HotProspector accounts

Build, troubleshoot, and maintain calendar integrations across various platforms (Google Calendar, ClubReady, Jane, PatientNow, Square, and others)

Build and manage automations and workflows using 
 and GHL's native automation tools

Troubleshoot and maintain Google Sheets and light Google Apps Script when needed

Handle any technical tasks that arise across the agency day to day



What We Need You to Know



GoHighLevel (GHL) – you must have hands-on experience building inside the platform, not just using it


 or similar automation tools (Zapier, n8n) – you need to understand how automations and multi-step workflows are built and how to troubleshoot them

Google Calendar integrations – experience syncing calendars across different platforms and solving integration issues in real time

Google Sheets – comfortable building, troubleshooting, and organizing data



What You Will Learn on the Job



HotProspector – we will train you, but you need to be someone who picks up new platforms fast

Our specific client systems and workflows



Who You Are



You are genuinely tech savvy, not just comfortable with computers but someone who actively enjoys solving technical problems

You use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to learn faster, troubleshoot smarter, and get things done without waiting to be spoon-fed answers

You are a critical thinker who can hop on a call with a client, encounter a calendar software you have never seen before, and figure out the integration on the spot

You communicate clearly and proactively, especially when something is not working

You take ownership of your tasks and do not need hand-holding to get things done

You are reliable, responsive, and take pride in your work



Why Join Scale 77

This is a ground-floor opportunity with a company that is growing fast. The person who fills this role will have direct exposure to the founders, real responsibility from day one, and a clear path to grow into a full-time, higher-paying position as we expand. We are not looking for someone to fill a seat, we are looking for someone to grow with us.

To Apply

Please include the following in your application:



A brief summary of your GHL experience and what you have built inside the platform

An automation or workflow you have built using 
 or a similar tool and what it did

Any calendar integration experience you have, including what platforms were involved

Your availability and time zone



Applications without these details will not be reviewed.

title: Visual Content Designer for Luxury Skincare & Wellness Brand
description:
Hi! I’m looking for a visual content designer to support two brands:



• Magnolia Skin Therapy — a results-driven skincare studio blending advanced treatments with a calm, elevated experience

• Spa Haven Suites — a serene wellness space designed for independent beauty and wellness professionals



This role focuses on creating clean, elevated, and brand-aligned social media visuals.



What You’ll Be Doing



• Designing social media graphics (educational, promotional, and brand awareness posts)

• Creating simple reels (text overlays, short clips, light editing)

• Developing and working from custom templates for consistent content

• Maintaining a cohesive, polished visual style across both brands

What I’m Looking For



• Strong eye for clean, minimal, elevated design

• Ability to follow brand direction and maintain consistency

• Comfortable working efficiently with structured, batch-style content

• Organized, detail-oriented, and reliable



You will be creating and working from custom templates, so a strong eye for clean, elevated design is important (not generic Canva-style layouts).

Details

MBTI results

title: Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper (Xero · AU Businesses)
description:
NOTE: Applicants who followed instructions will be contacted right away. We are hiring immediately.



Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-time

Working Hours: 8:00am – 4:00pm Philippine Time (Monday–Friday)



About the Role

We’re looking for a Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper with deep, hands-on Xero experience and proven experience supporting Australian e-commerce businesses.



This is not a general bookkeeping role. You will be responsible for accurate e-commerce financials, management reporting, and cashflow forecasting that give clear visibility over performance and cash position in a fast-moving online business.



Key Responsibilities (E-commerce Focused)



1. End-to-end bookkeeping in Xero for an Australian e-commerce business



2. Reconciliation of:

- Bank accounts & credit cards

- Shopify Payments, Stripe, PayPal, Afterpay and similar gateways



3. Accurate handling of:

- Online sales, refunds & chargebacks

- Platform, merchant & transaction fees

- Advertising spend (Meta, Google, TikTok, etc.)



4. Inventory and COGS tracking, including landed costs



5. Preparation of monthly management reporting:

- Profit & Loss

- Balance Sheet

- Cashflow statements



6. Build and maintain rolling cashflow forecasts



7. Assist with Australian BAS & GST reporting in coordination with external accountants



8. Maintain clean financial data across multiple entities and currencies where required



9. Proactively identify reporting issues, discrepancies, or cashflow risks



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

- Extensive hands-on experience with Xero

- Proven experience working with Australian e-commerce businesses



Strong understanding of:

- Shopify accounting workflows

- Payment gateway reconciliations

- Inventory accounting for e-commerce



Demonstrated experience creating:

- Management P&Ls

- Cashflow forecasts



Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills



Excellent written and spoken English



Nice to Have

- Experience with multi-store or multi-brand e-commerce businesses

- Experience supporting fast-growth online brands

- Comfortable working directly with founders or senior management



Mandatory Application Task (Required to Apply)

To apply for this role, you must complete the Excel task below.

Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Excel Task (30–45 minutes)



Create one Excel file with two tabs:



Tab 1 – E-commerce P&L Layout

Design a monthly Profit & Loss layout suitable for an Australian e-commerce business.

Your layout should clearly show:

Revenue (gross sales)

Cost of Goods Sold (including inventory & landed costs)

Gross Profit

Operating Expenses (advertising, platform fees, freight, overheads)

Net Profit



Tab 2 – Cashflow Forecast Layout

Design a rolling 3-month cashflow forecast layout that includes:

Opening cash balance

Cash inflows from sales

Cash outflows (inventory purchases, ad spend, operating costs, GST)

Closing cash balance per month



Notes:

You do not need to include real numbers

Structure, logic, and clarity matter more than formatting

Include formulas where appropriate



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. Your CV

2. Your Excel file (2 tabs as outlined above)



Applications missing the Excel file will not be considered.

title: Senior Paid Social Media Buyer
description:
Part-Time (3 Days/Week, Path to Full-Time) | Remote



Why You'll Love Working With Us:



We're a boutique Australian eCommerce growth agency that also acts as a fractional CMO for established brands. We execute comprehensive growth strategies across paid media,
 marketing, and conversion optimisation, taking our clients from good to exceptional. We prioritise long-term quality relationships and we're looking for someone who shares our values of collaboration, excellence, and work-life balance.



TO APPLY: Please do not apply via OnlineJobs.ph. Use the application form linked at the bottom of this job description.



Here's What Makes Us Different:



> Do the work that actually matters: Our automation tools handle the repetitive stuff (publishing, reporting, copy QC) so you spend your time on creative strategy, audience research, and the thinking that actually drives results. Not admin.

> Build rare, cross-discipline skills: This role sits at the intersection of performance media and creative strategy, a combination most agencies silo into separate teams. You'll develop expertise that makes you genuinely more valuable, not just a better button pusher.

> Great clients to work on: Our clients are established, collaborative brands who invest in marketing and trust the process. No micromanagers chasing vanity metrics. Most have been with us for 4+ years, which means stability for you and real room to do your best work.

> Own your results: You won't execute someone else's strategy. You'll bring the ideas, lead the creative direction, and be accountable for outcomes. The kind of ownership that's hard to find at most agencies.

> Flexible, remote work that actually works: Set your schedule around your life. The only requirement is 50%+ availability during Australian business hours (AEST).

> A culture worth working in: LGBT-owned, proudly diverse, and genuinely collaborative. Results-focused without the toxic pressure you'll find at bigger agencies.

> A stable, long-term home: We've been running since 2019 and most of our Philippine-based team have been with us for 3-5+ years. We pay weekly, every week, without exception. 



The Role - Own the Results Through Creative Strategy:



We're not looking for someone who optimises campaigns and waits for instructions. We want an expert Media Buyer who also happens to think like a Creative Strategist, someone who takes full ownership of client KPIs and leads the creative charge.

You won't design ads yourself. You'll architect the angles, hooks, and messaging that win, and oversee the team that brings them to life.



What You'll Do



Core - Paid Media and Creative Strategy:



> Own the creative strategy: Research audiences and consumer psychology, identify winning patterns from data, and drive the entire brief process covering angles, hooks, messaging, and testing roadmaps. Collaborate with our creative production team to ensure only well-hypothesised, compelling concepts move forward.

> Run the ad accounts: Execute and scale campaigns across Meta (primary), TikTok, and Pinterest. Use our automation tooling to streamline execution. Your focus is on strategic ideas and decisions, not manual tasks.

> Quality control creative and copy: Review all ad creative and copy against client brand guides before anything goes live. Use our AI-powered QC tools as a first pass, but bring your own sharp eye for what's on-brand, compelling, and built to convert.

> Plan ahead: Map campaign calendars for key sale events (Black Friday, EOFY, etc.), brief the team proactively, and ensure we're always working well ahead of major 
nts.

> Report on performance: Produce clear, insightful client reports (AI-assisted) that translate data into strategic recommendations, not just numbers.



Secondary: Cross-Channel Awareness



You won't run
, CRO or Google Ads. We have specialists for those. But you will:

> Monitor big-picture performance across channels and flag issues or opportunities (e.g. "paid is down, should we ramp up
 this week?")

> Collaborate with the Project Manager in weekly team check-ins to keep delivery on track

> Contribute strategic ideas where paid media intersects with other channels

> Oversee and review outputs from our AI tools as they're rolled out, providing feedback and ensuring quality



Bonus: if you have Google Ads experience, there's potential to fold that into your scope over time.



The Tech Stack We're Building:



We've already built, and are continuing to build, automation tools that handle the repetitive work so you can focus on what actually drives results:



> Automated ad publishing: Ads are built and published directly from Airtable. No manual uploading to Ads Manager.

> AI-powered copy generation and QC: We use custom Claude skills trained on client brand guides to write and review copy.

> Creative performance tracking: We're building dashboards and AI tools to surface winning hooks and angles across accounts.

> Optimisation tooling: We're actively developing an AI agent to assist with daily account analysis and optimisation. 



We want someone who can work with these tools and help shape how we use them. Underpinning all of this is a tight project management setup in ClickUp, so you always know what's on, what's due, and what the team is working on. This is what lets you focus on the work that actually matters.



Who You Are:



> A creative thinker first: You understand consumer psychology. You can look at data and see the story behind the numbers. > > You have strong instincts about what makes a great ad and you push back on mediocre creative.

> A genuine owner: You treat client accounts like your own business. You flag problems before they escalate. You don't wait to be told what to do.

> Efficient and organised: You can manage 5-8 accounts strategically without getting overwhelmed. You focus on what actually moves the needle.

> Tech-forward: You embrace AI and automation to work smarter, and you're excited by tools that take repetitive work off your plate.

> High standards: You don't ship ads you wouldn't be proud of. You care about quality (copy, creative, brand alignment) and it shows.

> A strong communicator: Native or C-level English. You can brief a design team clearly and explain performance to internal stakeholders.



Experience Required:



> 3+ years managing Meta Ads for eCommerce brands, with daily budgets of $500+/account

> Total career ad spend of $500k+, with proven scaling success (case studies required)

> Hands-on TikTok Ads experience for eCommerce, with deep understanding of what works creatively

> Demonstrated ability to develop creative strategy: briefing teams, developing angles and hooks, connecting data to creative direction and identifying patterns

> eCommerce focus, ideally in homewares, jewellery and fashion

> Native or C1/C2 English proficiency



Bonus Points:



> Pinterest Ads experience

> Google Ads knowledge

> Copywriting training or background

> ClickFunnels or funnel strategy experience

> Familiarity with Airtable, ClickUp, Looker Studio or similar workflow tools



Starting Details:



> Hours: Part-time, 3 days/week initially, with a clear path to full-time as our client roster grows

> Engagement type: Open to either part-time employment (with entitlements) or contractor arrangement, based on your preference.

> Location: Fully remote. Hybrid option for Sydney-based candidates

> Time zone: Must be available for 50%+ of Australian business hours (AEST)

> Compensation: $1,000 - $1,500 USD/month (3 days/week) | FTE $1,700 - $2,500 USD/month | + performance incentives

> Reports to: Chief Growth Marketer for strategy and Project Manager for day-to-day task management

> Growth Path: As the agency scales, there is a clear opportunity for this role to evolve into a broader team leadership position overseeing our client delivery pod.



Sounds like a good fit? Apply here: 
 



The code word for your application is growth.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) — Appointment Setter
description:
Job Description:

We are a Phoenix-based digital marketing agency (SocialBoostMedia) 

looking for a hungry, reliable SDR to help us book sales calls with 

local business owners in the Phoenix, Arizona area.



Your job is simple: reach out to potential clients every single day, 

spark interest in our services, and book calls onto my calendar. 

You will NOT be closing deals — that's my job. Your job is to get 

me in front of the right people.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Send 50–80 outreach messages per day via Instagram DM and cold

- Follow up with leads who haven't responded

- Qualify prospects before booking them on my calendar

- Track all outreach in a simple Google Sheet daily

- Report to me every day with numbers sent, replies, and calls booked



WHAT WE OFFER:

- $500/month base pay

- $250 bonus for every client who signs a contract

- Flexible hours — work on your own schedule

- Long-term position with room to grow as the agency scales



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR:

- Previous SDR, appointment setting, or outreach experience required

- Comfortable with Instagram DMs and cold
 outreach

- Fluent written English — you'll be messaging US business owners

- Organized, self-motivated, and consistent

- Available to start immediately



To apply, send me a 2–3 sentence explanation of your outreach 

experience and your best month of appointments set. 

Applications without this will not be considered.

title: ICD-10 Coder & OASIS Auditor (Home Health) — Remote (U.S. Time Zone)
description:
Type: Full-time preferred (open to strong part-time candidates)

Compensation: $600–$1,200 USD/month, based on experience and hours

Start: ASAP



About the Role



We’re hiring a detail-oriented ICD-10 Coder and OASIS Auditor to support U.S. home health documentation quality, coding accuracy, and compliance. You’ll review clinical records and OASIS assessments, ensure ICD-10 coding integrity, and work across multiple EMRs while maintaining strict HIPAA standards.



This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-moving environment, communicates clearly in English, and wants a long-term position with a growing team.



Key Responsibilities

• ICD-10 Coding (Home Health):

• Assign and validate ICD-10-CM codes based on clinical documentation

• Ensure coding supports accuracy, compliance, and payer requirements

• Identify documentation gaps and request clarifications when needed

• OASIS Auditing / QA:

• Audit OASIS assessments for completeness, accuracy, consistency, and compliance

• Flag errors, inconsistencies, and missed opportunities for correction

• Provide clear feedback to clinicians / internal team on required updates

• EMR Documentation Review:

• Navigate and work efficiently across multiple home health EMRs

• Extract, review, and reconcile documentation across visits, notes, and assessments

• Maintain organized audit trails and QA notes per internal process

• Compliance & Security:

• Handle PHI securely and follow HIPAA policies and internal security procedures

• Maintain confidentiality and follow access controls and secure workflows



Required Qualifications

• Proven experience in U.S. Home Health documentation workflows

• Strong working knowledge of ICD-10-CM coding (home health context)

• Hands-on experience with OASIS auditing / review (OASIS-E familiarity a plus)

• Comfortable working across multiple EMRs (home health systems)

• Excellent written and spoken English

• High attention to detail, strong judgment, and consistent reliability

• Ability to work U.S. time zone hours (e.g., Eastern/Central/Pacific—aligned with U.S. business day)



Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have)

• Formal coding credential(s) (e.g., AAPC/AHIMA) or equivalent experience

• Experience supporting QA programs, documentation improvement, or revenue integrity

• Familiarity with common home health EMRs (any major platforms is helpful)



What Success Looks Like

• Accurate, defensible coding with strong documentation support

• OASIS assessments that are clean, consistent, and audit-ready

• Fast, dependable turnaround times and clear communication

• Strong adherence to HIPAA/security procedures, every time

title: Deal Analyst for Healthcare Acquisition Platform
description:
Former investment banking analysts, private equity analysts, or search fund analysts strongly encouraged to apply



Overview



We are building a national healthcare acquisition platform focused on acquiring and scaling chiropractic practices across Canada.



Our company acquires profitable clinics, improves operations, and grows revenue through centralized marketing and management.



We are looking for a Deal Analyst to help us screen acquisition opportunities, analyze financials, and evaluate deals before we proceed to LOI or closing.



This role is ideal for someone with experience in:

 • Investment banking

 • Private equity

 • Search funds

 • Corporate development

 • M&A advisory

 • Financial modeling



?



What You Will Do



For each acquisition target, you will:



1. Financial Analysis

 • Review financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, tax returns)

 • Normalize EBITDA

 • Identify add-backs

 • Identify potential financial risks



2. Valuation Modeling

Build models to estimate:

 • EBITDA

 • purchase price multiples

 • ROI

 • IRR

 • cash-on-cash returns



3. Deal Scoring

Provide a short memo covering:

 • strengths

 • weaknesses

 • key risks

 • valuation opinion



4. Due Diligence Support

Help review:

 • financial statements

 • debt obligations

 • leases

 • payroll

 • revenue sources



?



Deliverables



For each deal reviewed, we expect:

 1. Financial model (Excel or Google Sheets)

 2. Deal summary (1–2 pages)

 3. Key risk assessment

 4. Recommendation

 • Pass

 • Investigate further

 • Strong acquisition candidate



?



Example Target Deal



Typical acquisition targets:

 • Revenue: $700k – $1.5M

 • EBITDA: $250k – $700k

 • Purchase price: $500k – $2M

 • Industry: Healthcare / Chiropractic



?



Ideal Candidate



You likely have experience in one of these areas:

 • Investment banking analyst

 • Private equity analyst

 • Search fund analyst

 • Corporate development

 • MBA with financial modeling expertise

 • M&A advisory



Strong skills in:

 • financial modeling

 • valuation

 • Excel / Google Sheets

 • due diligence



Healthcare experience is a bonus but not required.



?



Engagement



Initial engagement:



10–20 deals per year



Compensation:

 • Fixed fee per deal review

or

 • hourly consulting



Long-term collaboration preferred.



?



To Apply



Please include:

60 Second Video of why you would be the ideal candidate for this role



 1. Brief description of your M&A or financial modeling experience

 2. Example deals you have analyzed

 3. Sample financial model (if available)





Bonus if you have experience analyzing healthcare practices such as dental, chiropractic, or veterinary clinics.

title: Merchandise Planner
description:
Employment Type: Full-time

Start: Immediate

Working Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AEST

Salary: $280 per week





About the Role

We are seeking a commercially driven Merchandise Planner to join our team and play a key role in driving performance across a portfolio of premium global brands.



This role is responsible for managing Open-to-Buy (OTB), forecasting, and inventory strategy across both Wholesale and Direct-to-Consumer (eCommerce) channels. You will ensure the right product is in the right place at the right time, with a strong focus on core product continuity and Never Out of Stock (NOS) execution.



You’ll also work closely with wholesale partners to support growth through data-driven insights, forecasting, and replenishment planning.



Key Responsibilities:



OTB Planning & Forecasting

- Develop and manage OTB across Wholesale and DTC channels

- Build seasonal and in-season forecasts by brand, category, and channel

- Align buy plans with sales targets, stock turn, and margin expectations

- Continuously reforecast based on performance and inventory position



Inventory & Stock Management

- Optimise stock levels across warehouse, ecommerce, and wholesale

- Drive allocation strategies to maximise sell-through and reduce risk

- Identify slow-moving stock and recommend actionable solutions

- Partner with Operations to ensure strong stock flow and availability



Core / NOS Product Management

- Own forecasting and replenishment strategy for core “Never Out of Stock” lines

- Ensure continuity of key styles with minimal stock-outs

- Analyse historical trends and forward demand to guide reorder decisions

- Collaborate with Buying and Supply Chain on repeat orders and timing



Wholesale Partner Management

- Monitor wholesale account performance and identify growth opportunities

- Deliver regular reporting on sales, stock levels, and sell-through

- Manage replenishment programs for core product ranges

- Partner with accounts on forecasting and inventory planning

- Prepare and deliver Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs)



Trade Reporting & Insights

- Deliver weekly trade reports across all brands and channels

- Provide clear, actionable commercial insights

- Identify risks and opportunities early

- Track KPIs including sell-through, stock turn, WOS, and margin



Skills & Experience

- 3–6+ years in Merchandise Planning or Inventory Planning

- Strong experience with OTB, forecasting, and stock planning

- Experience across Wholesale and DTC/eCommerce channels

- Advanced Excel or Google Sheets skills

- Strong analytical mindset with commercial awareness



Key Attributes

- Commercially sharp and outcome-focused

- Data-driven but confident in decision-making

- Strong stakeholder management skills

- Proactive and solutions-oriented

- Thrives in a fast-paced environment



Why Join Us

- Work across a portfolio of premium global brands

- High-impact role with ownership from day one

- Opportunity to shape inventory strategy and commercial performance



To Apply:

- Please share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. What was the approximate monthly or seasonal OTB you managed, and across how many brands/categories?

Include the channels you planned for (Wholesale, DTC, or both)



2. How did you measure forecast accuracy in your role?

What actions did you take when performance was tracking below plan?



3. Provide one example where you directly improved a key KPI (e.g., stock turn, WOS, sell-through, or margin).

Include before vs after results (quantify if possible)



4. Describe how you managed replenishment for core/NOS lines.

How did you determine reorder timing and depth?



5. Advanced Excel / Data Application

Describe a specific Excel/Google Sheets model or tool you built that influenced planning decisions.

What problem did it solve?

title: Founding SDR / Business Development Specialist
description:

Ledger Lane is a new accounting brand being launched to support businesses outside of the NDIS sector. Our goal is to diversify our services and work with growing businesses across industries such as retail, cafés, hospitality, and professional services.

We are looking for a top-performing Sales Development Representative (SDR) who will help build the foundation of our sales pipeline. This is not a typical SDR role — you will help launch the brand, develop outreach strategies, build lead databases, and contribute to the overall business growth plan.

You will work closely with the leadership team to identify opportunities, create systems, and generate qualified leads for the business.

, LinkedIn, calls, and other channels)

Why Join Ledger Lane?

Long-term growth potential as the SDR team expands

Work directly with leadership on a high-impact project

title: Senior Video Editor & Motion Graphics Artist
description:

We are looking for an experienced Senior Video Editor & Motion Graphics Artist based in the Philippines to join our international creative team. 



This is a fully remote, long-term position working with a well-established Australian agency producing high-end lifestyle and luxury travel video content. Our projects focus on the great Australian outdoors, luxury properties, and cinematic travel experiences. 



Here are some examples of short form and long form content in our industry (and similar ones) that we are looking to create:

* Mercedes AMG

* Kinso

* Luxury camping videos

* eCommerce video content 

* Multi-camera podcasts 

* Short-form social media videos

Applications without this subject line may not be reviewed.

title: Client Services Director (US Law Firm Experience Required) [HE142]
description:
We’re looking for a Client Services Director who is organized, proactive, and truly passionate about guiding clients through every step of their legal journey. This is a unique opportunity to manage office operations, oversee client files from intake to delivery of estate plans, and make a meaningful impact while growing your career in trust, estate, probate, and business law.



Why This Role Is Exciting



Be the face of the firm for clients—help them feel heard, valued, and supported.

Take ownership of office operations and manage client files from intake to delivery.

Work closely with the drafter to ensure high-quality legal documents.

Learn trust, estate, probate, and business law in California.

Grow with the firm: show your value and increase your earning potential over time.

Work remotely, but with a structured 9–5 schedule and opportunities to make a real difference.

What You’ll Do



Client Intake & Onboarding



Be the first point of contact for new clients and leads.

Conduct intake calls, assess needs, and ensure a smooth onboarding experience.

Schedule consultations and provide clients with all necessary information upfront.



Client Relationship Management



Keep clients informed and supported throughout their case.

Follow up proactively and handle questions with clarity, empathy, and professionalism.

Monitor satisfaction and resolve concerns quickly.



Office & Team Leadership



Manage office operations efficiently.

Track metrics, identify workflow improvements, and ensure projects stay on track.

Take initiative—figure things out, take tasks off the attorney’s plate, and make the office run smoothly.



Oversee Legal Drafting



Work with outsourced document drafter to provide outline of plan and communicate specific case details.

Review work product from outsourced document drafter for quality control.

Draft legal documents based on templates.



Sales & Conversion Support



Work with staff on marketing, social media brand building, and setting up live presentations.

Follow up with potential clients after consultations and help them understand the value of the firm’s services.

Must-Haves



Excellent command of written and spoken English, including American idiomatic expressions.

Experience supporting US law firms and willingness to learn and master trust, estate, and probate law in California.

Self-starter who takes initiative and gets things done independently.

Exceptional organization, time management, and project completion skills.

A good sense of humor. We’re serious, but we don’t take ourselves too seriously. Work should be somewhat fun.



Core Values We Live By



Listening: Truly understand clients, colleagues, and team needs.

Excellence: Deliver the highest quality in every task.

Efficiency: Prioritize and execute with focus.

Persistence: Tackle challenges with determination.

Responsibility: Own your work and follow through.



Who We’re Looking For



Warm, empathetic, and client-focused.

Highly organized and detail-oriented.

Tech-savvy and comfortable learning new systems (CRM, case management,
).

Professional and independent, with the ability to maintain confidentiality.

Problem-solver and proactive team player.

Perks & Growth Opportunities



Learn California trust, estate, probate, and business law fundamentals.

Grow within the firm and increase your earning potential over time.

Hands-on experience with client intake, relationship management, and legal operations.

Opportunity to make a real impact in a fast-growing, client-focused law firm.



If you’re ready to take ownership, lead with empathy, and grow with a firm that values your skills and initiative, we want to hear from you. Apply today!

description:

Collaborate with analysts and tea
mbers to gather and validate information

Communicate clearly and professionally with tea
mbers

Write clearly and precisely
