title: Instagram Video Editor & Content Creator – AI Model Brand
description:
HIRING: Instagram Video Editor & Content Creator – AI Model Brand

Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term | $400/month



?????????????????????????????????????

ABOUT THE ROLE

?????????????????????????????????????



We are growing an Instagram page for an AI model brand and need a highly skilled, creative video editor who produces amazing, scroll-stopping content every single day.



This is a full-time, long-term position. We do not want someone who just edits clips — we want someone who is passionate about short-form content, understands what retains viewers, and delivers work that looks and feels world-class.



Quality is non-negotiable. Every single video must be amazing. If you are okay with "good enough," this role is not for you.



This role is 7 days a week. Please only apply if you are completely available and committed to long-term work.



?????????????????????????????????????

EXACT DAILY DELIVERABLES

?????????????????????????????????????



Every day, 7 days a week, you are responsible for:



REELS

- 10 Instagram Reels per day

- Mix of realistic/native-feel videos AND out-of-the-box high-concept edits

- Some with bold on-screen captions driving the story

- Others with heavy editing — cinematic cuts, transitions, sound design, visual effects

- Every Reel must open with a powerful hook in the first 2–3 seconds

- All files delivered in 9:16 format, 1080x1920, ready to post — zero revisions needed



STORIES

- 1 to 3 Stories per day, posted at different times (morning, midday, evening)

- Varied content — teasers, engagement prompts, behind the scenes, call to action

- Keeps the account active and visible throughout the full day



MAIN FEED POSTS

- 1 main feed post every 2–3 days

- This must be the highest quality content on the page

- Polished, professional, brand-forward — represents the AI model at its best

- Must be approved before posting



CAPTIONS

- Write caption copy and hashtag sets for every Reel delivered



?????????????????????????????????????

TRIAL PROJECT (PAID)

?????????????????????????????????????



Before hiring full-time, shortlisted candidates will complete a paid trial of 10 Reels:



- 2 realistic, native-feel Reels

- 2 out-of-the-box, high-concept Reels

- 2 Reels driven by bold on-screen captions

- 2 heavily edited Reels (effects, transitions, sound design)

- 2 freestyle Reels — your best ideas, your best work



All 10 delivered in 9:16 format, 1080x1920, ready to post with no changes needed.



IMPORTANT: The trial is your one shot to impress. Average work will not be accepted. We are looking for someone who makes us say "wow" with every video.



?????????????????????????????????????

REQUIREMENTS

?????????????????????????????????????



- Proven experience editing short-form video (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

- An obsession with quality — your work must be genuinely amazing, not just acceptable

- Deep understanding of hooks and retention-based editing

- Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects, or equivalent

- Experience with AI model, digital persona, or lifestyle brand content is a strong plus

- Able to work 7 days a week and meet daily deadlines without being chased

- Good written English for captions and daily communication

- Stable internet and your own equipment

- Portfolio of real short-form work is REQUIRED — no portfolio = no review

title: E - Commerce Graphic Designer with Meta Ads experience
description:

/Instagram). This role requires expertise in direct response creative that must match the aesthetic and quality of 8-figure direct-to-consumer (DTC) brands and immediately stop the scroll.

Portfolio is CRITICAL: Your submitted portfolio must immediately match or exceed the quality standard set by top-tier DTC brands. We are looking for clean, modern design with scroll-stopping visuals, strong typography, and expert product photography integration.

title: E - Commerce Video Editor
description:
Overview

We are seeking an exceptional, data-driven Video Editor obsessed with driving conversions for e-commerce/DTC brands. This is a fast-paced role requiring a marketer's mindset, platform expertise, and rapid iteration based on performance data.



Core Responsibilities (What You Will Do)

Conversion Focus: Edit raw footage (often UGC-style) into scroll-stopping, short-form ads (15-60 seconds) for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube, focused entirely on driving sales.



DR Implementation: Structure videos using Direct Response (DR) frameworks (e.g., Problem-Agitate-Solution), ensuring a powerful hook in the first 3 seconds, and seamless CTA integration.



Technical Execution: Apply advanced post-production techniques: color grading, audio mixing, speed ramping, dynamic transitions, and creating engaging typography/subtitles.



Rapid Iteration: Maintain fast turnaround (24 for first cuts) and produce multiple testing variations based on performance metrics (CTR, ROAS, Hook Rate).



Platform Mastery: Optimize content (9:16, 1:1, etc.) for native feel and best practices across TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Ads.



Pre-requisites (Must-Haves)

Experience: Proven portfolio of successful e-commerce/DTC ad editing (not just cinematic/corporate work).



Software Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut Pro.



Mindset: Deep understanding of DR Marketing and key metrics (ROAS, CTR). Must be performance-driven, flexible, and willing to iterate based on data without ego.



Skills: Expertise in UGC-style editing, audio/sound design, and closed captioning/subtitles.



Bonus Skills

Proficiency in After Effects, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve.



Familiarity with ad platforms and marketing metrics.



Workload: Initial paid trial project, then transitioning to 20 hours per week ongoing.



Shift: Flexible hours; work is output-based with strict deadlines.



To Apply:

If you are an exceptional designer with a portfolio that demonstrates world-class DTC brand quality, kindly fill out the application form:






Looking forward to receiving your application!

title: Shopify Developer & CRO Specialist
description:
verview

We are seeking a dual-threat Shopify Developer and Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist to lead the technical evolution of our eCommerce storefronts. You won't just be building pages; you will be architecting high-conversion shopping experiences.



The ideal candidate blends high-level Liquid coding expertise with a data-driven mindset for site speed optimization and user experience (UX) design. You will be responsible for turning traffic into revenue through technical excellence and rapid landing page deployment.



Work Structure & Compensation

Type: Part-time or Project-based. (for part time - possibly 10-20 hours)



Rate of Pay: $8 - 10 USD per hour (negotiable based on technical expertise).



Location: Remote.



Core Responsibilities

1. Shopify Development & Technical Management

Custom Development: Build and maintain high-performance Shopify themes using Liquid, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.



App & Stack Management: Lead the integration and optimization of subscription apps, bundle apps, and theme builders to ensure a seamless backend and frontend experience.



Klaviyo Design Implementation: Partner with the creative team to implement high-fidelity, technical designs within Klaviyo
 templates.



Checkout Optimization: Implement and manage quantity breaks and custom "Buy Box" configurations to maximize Average Order Value (AOV).



Site Health: Monitor and improve Core Web Vitals to ensure lightning-fast performance across all devices.



2. Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) & Landing Pages

Rapid Deployment: Use 
 to quickly launch, test, and iterate on pre-
 for
/Meta ad campaigns.



Funnel Integration: Seamlessly plug quantity breaks, bundles, and custom checkout logic into Pagedeck pages to ensure a consistent customer journey.



A/B Testing: Design and analyze tests on key conversion elements (headlines, CTA buttons, offer structures) to improve site-wide conversion rates.



UX/UI Audits: Utilize data from heatmaps and GA4 to identify friction points and implement technical fixes.



Required Experience & Skills

Experience: 4+ years of professional Shopify development experience, specifically with high-volume DTC brands.



Platform Mastery: Advanced knowledge of Liquid, Shopify APIs, 
, and the latest Shopify Theme Store standards.



CRO Strategy: Proven ability to increase conversion rates through technical changes and offer-based optimizations (like bundles and quantity breaks).



Design Eye: Proficiency in Figma to translate designs into pixel-perfect, mobile-first code.



Analytical Mindset: Familiarity with performance marketing metrics like CAC, AOV, and Conversion Rate.



To Apply

Please submit the following to be considered for the role:



Portfolio: Your GitHub link or a portfolio showcasing previous Shopify and Landing Page work.



Summary: A brief overview of your experience with Pagedeck, Klaviyo design implementation, and custom Shopify Bundle/Buy Box builds.



Loom Video: A short (2–3 minute) Loom video introducing yourself, explaining your technical background, and sharing a specific example of a CRO win you achieved for a past client.



Send them to 
 for screening. Looking forward to your application!

title: Email & SMS Manager (Klaviyo Specialist)
description:
Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled
 & SMS Manager to lead the strategy, design, and execution of our lifecycle marketing. This role is designed for a hybrid talent who is equally comfortable with data-driven automation (Flows) and creative campaign execution (Campaigns).



You will be responsible for the end-to-end management of our
 and SMS channels, ensuring every touchpoint is high-performing, on-brand, and optimized for conversion within the health and wellness sector.



Work Structure & Role Details



Type: Part-time. 10 - 20 hours per week



Location: Remote.



Timezone: Flexible hours, but must be available within CST morning working hours.



Rate of Pay: $8 USD per hour.





Start Date: Immediate.



Key Responsibilities

Full Channel Management: Own the strategy and execution for both
 and SMS channels within Klaviyo, managing both automated Flows and scheduled Campaigns.



Creative Execution: Lead the Graphic Design and Direct Response Copywriting for all campaigns, ensuring a premium aesthetic and high-converting messaging.



Technical Implementation: Design and build responsive templates using Figma and Klaviyo.





Automation & Optimization: Build, test, and optimize complex workflows, including dynamic content blocks, segmentation tags, and product feeds.





Performance Standards: Ensure mobile-responsive design and follow deliverability best practices, including image sizing and text-to-image ratios.





Collaboration: Partner with the marketing team to align creative output with brand style guides and seasonal growth targets.



Required Experience & Skills

E-commerce Expertise: 3+ years of experience delivering growth for DTC/e-commerce brands through
 and SMS marketing.



Platform Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Klaviyo (Flows and Campaigns) and Figma (or related design software).



Creative Hybrid: Strong background in Graphic Design and Copywriting specifically for mobile-first channels.



Industry Knowledge: Familiarity with the Health and Wellness space to effectively communicate brand benefits and product education.



Communication: Fluent in English with excellent written and verbal skills.



Mindset: Detail-oriented, proactive, and a self-starter.



To Apply:

title: E - Commerce Bookkeeper (QuickBooks & Shopify Specialist)
description:
Overview

We are looking for a meticulous and experienced eCommerce Bookkeeper to manage the financial records for our health and wellness brand group. Your primary mission will be to ensure our accounts are investor-ready, reconcile all 2025 data, and prepare our entities for seamless tax filing.



This role requires a specialist who understands the nuances of eCommerce accounting, specifically the integration between Shopify and QuickBooks.



Work Schedule & Compensation

Rate: 4 - 6 USD

Schedule: Flexible time (must reconcile every EST midnight)



Key Responsibilities

Reconciliation: Perform deep reconciliation for the full 2025 financial year to ensure 100?curacy for tax season.

QuickBooks Management: Maintain and optimize QuickBooks (our primary accounting software) as the single source of truth.

eCommerce Accounting: Reconcile Shopify sales, payouts, and transaction fees.

Banking & Platforms: Manage and reconcile transactions across our banking stack, including Wise, Chase Bank, and Slash Financial.

End-of-Month (EOM): Execute full end-of-month procedures, including financial reporting and balance sheet reconciliation.

Process Adherence: Accurately follow established procedure manuals while suggesting improvements to streamline our financial systems.



Pre-requisites (Must-Haves)

QuickBooks Mastery: Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks is essential (Xero/MYOB experience is a bonus but not the focus).

Shopify Proficiency: Deep understanding of Shopify’s backend, specifically regarding financial reporting and payouts.

eCommerce Experience: Proven track record of bookkeeping for physical product brands (DTC).

Attention to Detail: Exceptional accuracy when handling high-volume transactions across multiple banking platforms.

Reliability: Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to meet strict end-of-month and tax-readiness deadlines.



To Apply

Please fill out the application form: 
/appgWJZPZOmqW3xQl/pagX70SRLuI0D6zJq/form and put OOOBOOKKEEPER in the Job Title.

title: Marketing & Administrative Virtual Assistant
description:
We are looking for a Marketing & Administrative Virtual Assistant to help manage digital marketing campaigns, handle administrative tasks, and support backend operations for our educational platform. The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and able to work independently with experience in digital marketing, CRM tools, and administrative support.





The position is part-time, requiring 20 hours per week (4 hours per day) with a flexible schedule, including some overlap with Pacific Time.





Job duties and responsibilities:

 

1. Marketing Support:

        - Assist in the creation and management of digital advertising campaigns on Google and
, ensuring 

          compliance with platform guidelines.

        - Research strategies to improve ad approval rates and maximize reach, particularly in the context of psychedelic-

           related content.

        - Monitor ad performance, adjust targeting, and conduct split testing to optimize results.

         - Manage and update
 marketing campaigns via MailChimp, including audience segmentation and automation  

             setup.

       - Maintain and update social media content and engagement strategies.

       - Create landing pages, lead magnets, and social media graphics consistent with our established brand identity.

       - Research and implement growth strategies to expand our audience, particularly individuals with life-threatening 

           illnesses and medical professionals.



 2. Administrative Support:

         - Manage backend operations for our education platform (Thinkific), including generating course certificates.

         - Handle data entry and manual uploads to MailChimp, WordPress (WooCommerce and Fluent Forms Pro), and  

             Eventbrite.

        - Process and organize registrant data from Eventbrite and integrate it into MailChimp.

        - Assist with routine QuickBooks data entry tasks as needed.

        - Maintain and update the organization’s practitioner directory.

        - Provide general administrative support, including scheduling, documentation, and
 management.





Qualifications 



   - Experience in digital marketing, Google &
 ads, and
 marketing

   - Familiarity with Thinkific, MailChimp, WordPress, Eventbrite, and QuickBooks

   - Strong organizational & communication skills

   - Ability to work independently with great attention to detail

    - Experience handling ad compliance and optimization for sensitive topics is a plus!



If you believe you're a strong fit for this position, please respond with the following:



 1. A link to your resume in PDF format. 



          Your resume should include your contact details, a recent professional photo, and a summary of your work 

           experience, emphasizing tasks relevant to this role.



2. A screenshot of your PC specifications and internet speed, 

3. A one-minute Vocaroo recording of your self-introduction

4. Your WhatsApp number for easy communication. 



To ensure you've read this message carefully, please include the word "MarketingAdmin" in the subject line of your
.



We look forward to reviewing your application!

title: Remote Executive Assistant (Content & Coordination Support)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to support day-to-day administrative operations and coordination tasks. This role centers on managing schedules, assisting with organization, and providing light support for content-related activities.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, takes initiative, and works independently with minimal supervision. This position is designed as a starting point with the potential to grow as responsibilities and processes become more established.



Core Responsibilities



Schedule & Executive Support (Primary Responsibility)

-Oversee and maintain calendars, including meetings, calls, and appointments

-Keep schedules organized, optimized, and aligned with priorities

-Support the growing number of commitments and ensure proper coordination

-Handle scheduling logistics and follow-ups when necessary



Social Media Assistance (Execution Support)

-Post and manage content across platforms such as
, TikTok, LinkedIn, and Instagram

-Help ensure messaging remains consistent and aligned

-Organize content and maintain posting timelines

-Provide support in improving visibility (no involvement in strategy or content creation)



Website Maintenance (Occasional Task – Squarespace)

-Make updates to the existing Squarespace website when required

-Publish blog entries

-Upload images and perform minor content edits



Required Qualifications



-Minimum of 2 years’ experience in an Executive Assistant or Administrative Support role

-Strong English communication skills with the ability to clearly convey information and decisions

-At least 2 years of experience managing calendars and schedules using tools such as Google Calendar (Google Workspace) or Microsoft Outlook Calendar (Microsoft 365)

-At least 2 years of experience posting and managing content on social media platforms 
, TikTok, LinkedIn, Instagram)

-At least 2 years of experience using communication and collaboration tools such as Slack, Zoom, and
 platforms (Gmail or Outlook)

At least 1 year of experience updating website content using CMS platforms like Squarespace or WordPress



Preferred Qualifications



-Experience using social media management tools such as Hootsuite or Buffer

-Familiarity with basic design tools like Canva

-Basic knowledge of blog publishing and SEO within CMS platforms such as Squarespace or WordPress

-Experience with productivity and cloud-based tools such as Google Workspace or Microsoft 365

-Experience with task and workflow management platforms like Trello or Asana



Work hours: 11 PM - 8 AM Philippine Time.

title: BIM Architectural/Structural Modeler (On-Site)
description:
BIM Architectural Modeler Role



Update and maintain architectural BIM models for design and as-built conditions.

Produce and revise shop drawings, wall setting-out, tile setting layouts, and architectural details.

Coordinate with architects, engineers, and contractors to resolve clashes and incorporate design changes.

Requirements: Proficient in Revit/BIM tools, 2+ years BIM modeling experience, strong understanding of architectural construction and setting-out practices.



Update architectural and structural BIM models; produce shop drawings, wall/tile setting-out, concrete body plans, and other construction deliverables.

Coordinate multidisciplinary inputs, perform clash detection, and ensure models reflect as-built/site conditions.

Requirements: 2+ years BIM experience, proficient in Revit and Civil 3D (or equivalents), practical knowledge of architectural and structural setting-out and shop drawing production.

title: Buyer / Wholesale Sourcing Specialist (Alibaba)
description:
About Redjumla Wholesale

Redjumla Wholesale is an international trading and wholesale company based in Dubai that sources a wide range of products for our clients. We work closely with suppliers worldwide to find competitive prices and reliable manufacturing partners. To support our growth, we are looking for a proactive Buyer / Sourcing Specialist who can efficiently identify and negotiate with suppliers on Alibaba.



Role Overview

As a Buyer / Sourcing Specialist, you will be responsible for contacting suppliers on Alibaba based on product requests received from our customers. Your main objective is to quickly identify reliable suppliers, obtain competitive pricing, and present the best options to our team in a clear and structured overview.



Key Responsibilities



Search for suitable suppliers on Alibaba based on incoming product requests from clients

Contact at least 6 suppliers per product within 24–48 hours of receiving the request

Request quotations, product specifications, and minimum order quantities

Negotiate prices whenever possible to achieve the best deal

Compare supplier offers and present them in a clear and organized overview for internal review

Maintain accurate administration and documentation of all supplier communications and quotations

Track supplier responses, lead times, and pricing updates

Support the team in selecting the most competitive supplier options



Requirements



Experience in product sourcing, procurement, or purchasing using Alibaba

Strong negotiation and communication skills

Ability to work efficiently under deadlines (24–48 hour sourcing window)

Highly organized and detail-oriented with strong administrative skills

Ability to compare multiple supplier offers and present structured reports

Proficient in English (written and spoken)

Comfortable working with spreadsheets and online sourcing platforms



Preferred Qualifications



Experience working with international suppliers or trading companies

Knowledge of import/export or wholesale sourcing processes

Familiarity with product sourcing tools and supplier evaluation



What We Offer



Opportunity to work with an international sourcing network

Dynamic role in a growing wholesale company

Competitive compensation based on experience



How to Apply



If you are skilled in supplier sourcing and negotiation and enjoy working in a fast-paced international trading environment, we would love to hear from you.

Please send your application including your CV and a short introduction explaining your sourcing experience.



Questions you have to answer when applying for this job:

What you would like to earn per month if you work 20 hours per week?

What you would like to earn per month if you work 40 hours per week?

How would you describe your working method from A-to-Z when contacting suppliers on Alibaba?

Are you willing to move to Dubai to work on location?

seasonal coloring bookmarks

simple craft templates

printable classroom activities

title: Part-Time Lead Generation & Outreach Operator (B2B Automation)
description:
About Us

We build automation software for finance and operations teams. Our systems help companies resolve reconciliation exceptions faster, identifying the right person to fix problems in minutes instead of days. Over the next 5 months, our goal is to onboard 50 pilot customers across APAC. Your role is to help us identify the right companies and start conversations with the right decision-makers.



Your Role

Your responsibility is to find the right prospects and start conversations. Tasks include:

• Research companies that match our Ideal Customer Profile

• Identify decision-makers (CFO, Controller, COO, VP Operations)

• Build verified contact lists

• Send personalized outreach via LinkedIn and

• Track responses and schedule discovery calls



This is not mass cold
 blasting. We care about relevance and quality of outreach, not volume.



Success Metrics

Your first month goal:

• Build a list of 50 qualified companies

• Identify 2–3 decision-makers per company

• Generate 5–8 conversations or discovery calls



The founder will take all calls, with you joining for learning and eventual handover.



Tools You May Use

Helpful but not mandatory:

• LinkedIn Sales Navigator

• Apollo

• Instantly

• Clay

• Google Sheets / Airtable

We value resourcefulness more than tool knowledge.



Requirements

You should:

• Have 1+ year experience in B2B lead generation or sales support

• Write clear professional English

• Be comfortable researching companies online

• Be detail-oriented and able to follow instructions carefully



Bonus if you have worked with:

• Finance or accounting companies

• Logistics / supply chain companies

• B2B SaaS outreach

title: Cold Calling + Data Entry Admin  + Texting/SMS communication
description:
Hello,



I am looking for a part-time (open to full time) Cold Calling and Data Entry Admin for Real Estate Classes & Real Estate Clients who is also comfortable with texting/SMS communication.



I am looking for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and experienced in data entry, CRM management, and client communication. This role is not just basic data entry — I need someone who can manage backend systems, communicate with leads, and help support course creation and sales.



You will be working inside Go High Level and our Whop platform ([ 
 ]) to help manage and build out real estate courses, upload content, organize modules, automate follow-ups, and ensure students and clients have a smooth experience.



I would like someone who understands:



* Accurate and efficient data entry

* CRM management (Go High Level experience is Mandatory)

* Uploading and organizing online course content

* Creating funnels and automations (willing to learn)

* Text/SMS follow-ups with leads

* Cold calling real estate prospects

* Managing contact lists and tagging systems

* Basic tech troubleshooting

* Following clear systems and also thinking independently



I am looking for someone who can:



* Enter and organize client and student data daily

* Send SMS messages and follow up with leads

* Make cold calls to potential real estate clients and students

* Help build and structure online real estate courses inside Go High Level

* Assist with launching and managing offers on Whop

* Track course sales and commissions

* Work independently without needing constant direction



You can work any 4-hour shift, 5 days per week. (20 hours total)



Starting base pay is $4 per hour + Commissions.



In addition to your base pay, you will receive commission for every course sold. This is where your income potential becomes unlimited. The better you are at follow-ups, organization, and helping us optimize the course system, the more you can earn.



I am looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with the company and increase their income over time.



If this sounds like something you can do, please send:



* Your resume

* Your experience with Cold Calling and SMS follow-ups (mandatory) 

* Any experience with Go High Level (mandatory)

* Any experience with course platforms (Kajabi, Teachable, Whop, etc.)

* A short voice recording introducing yourself (30 secs minimum)



Please also answer this question in your application:



If you were given 200 new real estate leads today, what steps would you take in your first 48 hours?



Send your application here on OnlineJobs.ph. or
: 



Thank you very much, and I look forward to hearing from you!



Sincerely,

Monique

title: Social Media Coordinator Job Description
description:
We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer/Social Media Coordinator to join our team. This role is perfect for someone who loves content creation, thrives on organization, and has an eye for brand consistency. You’ll be responsible for creating, scheduling, and coordinating social media posts that are visually on-brand, strategically aligned, and consistently published across multiple platforms.



Core Values

We value personal excellence, growth, and a “Family First” approach. We are a small, 97 percent female team committed to making a real impact by helping service-based entrepreneurs and small business owners leverage automation and AI to grow their businesses.



Key Responsibilities

Content Creation: Design engaging graphics, short-form videos, carousels, and other social media assets using Canva (or similar tools) that reflect our brand guidelines.



? Copywriting: Write captions that are compelling, clear, and aligned with our brand’s tone and messaging.

? Scheduling & Publishing: Manage the content calendar, ensuring posts are scheduled and published on time using tools   such as GoHighLevel/Zagly.

? Brand Consistency: Ensure every post is visually and tonally aligned with our brand identity.

? Quality Control: Review all posts for formatting, grammar, and link accuracy before publishing.

? Engagement: Monitor comments, tags, and messages flagging opportunities for team follow-up and ensuring a professional online presence.

? Reporting: Track and report on key performance metrics (engagement, reach, clicks), providing insights and recommendations for improvement.

? Coordination: Keep the content pipeline organized, collaborating with the team on campaigns, launches, and promotions.



Requirements

Soft Skills:



? Critical Thinking: Ability to adapt to changing trends and adjust strategies.

? Communication: Strong written and verbal English skills with a knack for persuasive, clear messaging.

? Attention to Detail: High level of accuracy with posts, formatting, and scheduling.

? Creativity: Ability to produce fresh, engaging content ideas that capture attention.

? Positive Attitude: A proactive, can-do mindset with the ability to work independently and meet deadlines.



Hard Skills:



? Design Tools: Proficiency with Canva, Adobe Express, or similar tools for content creation.

? Social Media Management: Experience with scheduling tool: GoHighLevel

? Analytics: Familiarity with basic social media metrics and reporting.

? Organization: Ability to manage multiple accounts, content streams, and deadlines simultaneously.

? Platform Knowledge: Working knowledge of Instagram,

mber of our PH office.

ntum behind it.

This is not a role for someone who needs step-by-step instructions for every task. We want someone who receives a brief, asks the right questions, and gets it done.



What You Will Be Doing



- Building and managing our social media presence across Instagram, TikTok, and
, including content scheduling and basic content creation

- Building out our e-commerce store across Shopify and TikTok Shop, including product listings, pricing, categories, and order management

- Handling day-to-day operations including supplier communications, invoicing, tracking, and general admin

- Researching influencers and supporting outreach and partnership activity

- Monitoring performance across platforms and proactively flagging anything that needs attention



What We Are Looking For

Desirable (not essential):

 marketing platforms

The Details



- Fully remote

- Full-time, 40 hours per week. This is an exclusive commitment. We ask that applicants are not simultaneously employed elsewhere or taking on additional clients during contracted hours

- This role offers above-market compensation for the right candidate. We are paying for solid, demonstrable experience. You will be assessed on it

- Pre-launch brand. You will be helping build this from the early stages

title: Billing and Claims Assistant (ABA industry)
description:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Billing and Claims Assistant to support our billing operations within the ABA therapy space. This role is responsible for assisting with insurance claims processing, payment posting, eligibility verification, and resolving billing discrepancies. The ideal candidate has experience working with ABA providers, understands the insurance billing lifecycle, and can manage multiple tasks while maintaining accuracy and compliance. Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to communicate professionally with internal teams and insurance payers are essential.



Key Responsibilities:



Prepare, submit, and track insurance claims for ABA therapy services.



Review claims for accuracy and completeness prior to submission.



Follow up with insurance companies on unpaid or denied claims.



Assist with claim corrections, resubmissions, and appeals when necessary.

Reconcile billing reports and assist with identifying discrepancies.



Verify patient insurance eligibility and benefits as needed.



Maintain accurate billing records and documentation in accordance with company policies and payer requirements.

Assist with maintaining organized records of authorizations, claims, and payment history.



Support the billing team with administrative tasks and reporting.



Qualifications:



Previous experience in medical billing, claims processing, or revenue cycle support, preferably in ABA therapy or behavioral health.



Familiarity with insurance claims processes, EOBs, and denial management.



Experience working with Medicaid, commercial insurance, or behavioral health payers is preferred.



Strong attention to detail and accuracy when handling financial and patient data.



Excellent organizational and time-management skills.



Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Strong written and verbal communication skills.

title: Property Cleaning and Maintenance Support
description:
About the Role



As the Guest Liaison and Property Manager Support, you will serve as the cornerstone of guest communication and day-to-day operational coordination, ensuring seamless stays across the client’s short-term holiday rentals. In this multifaceted role, you will not only manage guest interactions and maintenance requests, but also support cleaner coordination, scheduling, and quality control to uphold high operational standards.



You’ll wear multiple hats—balancing guest experience, cleaner logistics, and property support. If you are highly organized, proactive, and committed to delivering exceptional service while coordinating across multiple stakeholders, we’d love to meet you!



Key Responsibilities

Guest Liaison:



Respond promptly and professionally to guest inquiries across multiple booking platforms (Airbnb, 
, VRBO, Company Website).

Vet potential guests to ensure they meet booking criteria and identify any potential red flags.

Proactively communicate with guests throughout their booking journey, providing clear instructions, local recommendations, and addressing concerns.

Complete accurate and insightful guest reviews and collect feedback to enhance overall experience.

Manage the company
 inbox, including responding, forwarding, and assigning
s as needed.

Answer, log, and action guest phone calls, providing solutions or escalating issues when necessary.



Cleaner Coordination & Quality Control:



Monitor cleaner shifts throughout the day to ensure jobs are progressing within scheduled timeframes.

Review shift photos and cleaner notes to ensure cleaning standards and quality expectations are consistently met.

Communicate with cleaners via phone to follow up on timing, job completion, and quality checks.

Escalate any performance or quality concerns to senior staff when required.



Cleaner Scheduling & Logistics:



Assign cleaning shifts as bookings and job requests come in, ensuring efficient and timely coverage.

Allocate jobs to the most appropriate cleaners based on location and travel time.

Support same-day scheduling initially, with progression into advanced and forward scheduling as experience grows.

Maintain regular communication with cleaners to ensure smooth daily operations.



Operations and Maintenance:



Log and manage maintenance requests in internal systems, ensuring all relevant details are captured.

Gather necessary information from guests regarding reported issues.

Troubleshoot minor maintenance concerns where possible before escalation.

Liaise with property owners for approvals when required.

Issue work orders to trades and contractors and monitor progress through to completion.

Follow up on maintenance tasks to ensure timely resolution based on urgency.

Utilise property management systems (e.g., Homhero) to manage bookings, communications, and tasks.

Maintain and update property information and documentation in Google Drive.



Stock & Linen Support:



Assist in ordering and maintaining appropriate stock levels for cleaning supplies and linen.

Support regular stock checks to ensure operational readiness and efficiency.



Maintaining Excellence:



Identify opportunities to enhance guest experience and operational efficiency.

Uphold company policies and maintain high standards of professionalism and service.

Collaborate closely with tea
mbers to ensure seamless service delivery across all touchpoints.



Other Responsibilities:



Complete additional tasks assigned by the team as needed.

Stay up to date on industry trends and best practices in short-term rentals.

Foster a positive, proactive, and collaborative team environment.



About You



Excellent written and verbal communication skills with strong customer service or hospitality experience.

Highly organized with strong time management skills and attention to detail.

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and thrive in a fast-paced environment.

Experience with booking platforms and tools such as Homhero, Google Drive, Gmail, Airbnb, 
, and VRBO is preferred.

Strong problem-solving skills with a proactive, solutions-focused mindset.

Comfortable communicating frequently via phone and coordinating with multiple stakeholders.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.



Benefits Included



Health insurance

Internet allowance

KPI incentive program

Fortnightly virtual happy hour 

Annual group offsites







Finer Details



Schedule: TBD

Start Date: TBD

title: VA/SEO/High Level
description:
We are a fast-growing group of service-based businesses looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help manage day-to-day administrative tasks across multiple companies.

This role will support operations for:

A commercial cleaning company

An epoxy flooring company

A holiday lighting company

We are looking for someone who is organized, proactive, and comfortable learning new systems. This is a long-term opportunity with room to grow into a larger role.

???? Responsibilities:

Manage and organize
 inboxes

Send estimates, invoices, and follow-ups

Update CRM systems (HighLevel, Jobber, etc.)

Track leads and job progress

Respond to basic customer inquiries (scripts/templates provided)

Assist with hiring (review applicants, send messages, schedule interviews)

Maintain and organize documents (Google Drive, spreadsheets, etc.)

Help document processes and create SOPs as we grow

? Requirements:

Strong English communication (written and verbal)

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Tech-savvy and able to learn new systems quickly

Reliable and responsive

? Hours & Pay:

Opportunity to increase hours over time

Competitive hourly rate based on experience

???? What We’re Looking For:

We don’t just want someone to complete tasks — we want someone who can help bring structure and organization to our businesses.

If you are proactive, dependable, and take pride in your work, this can grow into a long-term position with more responsibility.

???? To Apply:

A brief introduction about yourself

Your experience with admin or VA work

Any tools or systems you’ve used (CRM, QuickBooks, etc.)

The word “ORGANIZED” in your application (to confirm attention to detail)

title: Bilingual (English/Spanish) Marketing Ads Manager – Meta + GHL
description:
We are a start-up real estate business in the DFW (Dallas–Fort Worth) area and the founders of a private microschool homeschool for struggling teens. We need to run two marketing systems:



1. Real Estate (English + Spanish)  

   – General home sellers /buyers

   – Divorce niche  

   – Hispanic homeowners and buyers



2. Microschool (English + Spanish)  

   – Parents seeking alternative education  

     



We are hiring a Bilingual (English/Spanish) Marketing Ads Manager who specializes in Meta Ads 
/Instagram) and GoHighLevel. This is a long?term position for someone who can manage our entire marketing system.



---



Responsibilities



Meta Ads 
/Instagram)

- Create and launch ad campaigns in English and Spanish  

- Build DFW?specific audiences  

- Optimize campaigns for cost per lead  

- Create simple Canva creatives (images + short videos)  

- Write ad copy in both English and Spanish  

- Test new hooks, creatives, and audiences weekly  



Funnels + GoHighLevel

- Build landing pages (English + Spanish)  

- Create forms, pipelines, and automations  

- Set up SMS +
 follow?up sequences  

- Maintain CRM organization for both businesses  

- Track lead flow and ensure no leads are lost  

- Improve funnel performance over time  



Reporting

- Weekly report including:  

  – Cost per lead  

  – Cost per appointment  

  – Cost per seller lead  

  – Cost per microschool enrollment  

- Provide recommendations for improvement  

- Communicate proactively about results and ideas  



---



Required Skills

- Fluent in English + Spanish (written and spoken)  

- 2+ years experience with Meta Ads Manager  

- Strong experience with GoHighLevel (funnels + automations)  

- Canva (basic design skills)  

- Strong copywriting in both languages  

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines  

- Reliable communication and attention to detail  

You Must Be Able to Build Everything From Scratch

We need someone who can take full ownership of our marketing system. This means:



- You can build campaigns from the ground up  

- You do NOT need us to tell you what to do step?by?step  

- You can create ads, funnels, automations, and reporting without supervision  

- You can set up the entire system even if we start with nothing  

- You can guide us on best practices and what needs to be done next  

- You can manage both businesses (real estate + microschool) with confidence  



We are looking for someone who is proactive, independent, and able to build a complete marketing engine from zero.



Temporary Phone Support for Microschool Enrollment

This role includes answering phone calls and responding to parent inquiries for our microschool until all seats are filled for the year. This is temporary and only needed during the enrollment period.



You will:

- Answer calls from interested parents  

- Follow a simple script we provide  

- Explain the basics of the program  

- Schedule enrollment calls  

- Send follow?up messages  

- Track parent inquiries inside GoHighLevel  



Once all seats are filled, this responsibility ends, and the role becomes 100% marketing and ads management.





---



Bonus Skills (Not required but preferred)

- Experience running real estate ads  

- Experience running education/parent?focused ads  

- Short?form video editing  

- Understanding of Hispanic culture and communication style  



---



Compensation

- Long?term position  



---



How to Apply

Please send:



1. A short video introducing yourself (English + Spanish)  

2. Examples of Meta ads you have managed  

3. Funnels you have built in GoHighLevel  

4. Your expected monthly rate  

5. Your availability (hours + timezone)



---



???????? VERSIÓN EN ESPAÑOL



Somos un negocio de bienes raíces en el área de DFW (Dallas–Fort Worth) y también operamos una microschool privada para jóvenes que están batallando en la escuela tradicional. Manejamos dos sistemas de marketing:



1. Bienes Raíces (Inglés + Español)  

   – Vendedores generales  

   – Niche de divorcio  

   – Dueños de casa hispanos  



2. Microschool (Inglés + Español)  

   – Padres buscando educación alternativa  

   – Familias que prefieren comunicación en español  



Estamos contratando un Gerente de Anuncios de Marketing Bilingüe (Inglés/Español) con experiencia en Meta Ads 
/Instagram) y GoHighLevel. Esta es una posición a largo plazo para alguien que pueda manejar todo nuestro sistema de marketing.



---



Responsabilidades



Meta Ads 
/Instagram)

- Crear y lanzar campañas en inglés y español  

- Construir audiencias específicas de DFW  

- Optimizar campañas para reducir el costo por lead  

- Crear diseños simples en Canva (imágenes y videos cortos)  

- Escribir textos publicitarios en ambos idiomas  

- Probar nuevos hooks, creativos y audiencias semanalmente  



Embudos + GoHighLevel

- Crear landing pages (Inglés + Español)  

- Formularios, pipelines y automatizaciones  

- Configurar secuencias de SMS y correos de seguimiento  

- Mantener el CRM organizado para ambos negocios  

- Monitorear el flujo de leads  

- Mejorar el rendimiento de los embudos con el tiempo  



Reportes

- Reporte semanal con:  

  – Costo por lead  

  – Costo por cita  

  – Costo por lead vendedor  

  – Costo por inscripción en la microschool  

- Recomendaciones de mejora  

- Comunicación proactiva sobre resultados e ideas  



---



Habilidades Requeridas

- Inglés + Español fluido (escrito y hablado)  

- 2+ años de experiencia con Meta Ads Manager  

- Experiencia sólida con GoHighLevel (embudos + automatizaciones)  

- Canva (diseño básico)  

- Excelente redacción en ambos idiomas  

- Capacidad de trabajar de forma independiente  

- Comunicación confiable y atención al detalle  

Debes Poder Construir Todo Desde Cero

Necesitamos a alguien que pueda tomar control total de nuestro sistema de marketing. Esto significa:



- Puedes crear campañas desde cero  

- NO necesitas que te digamos cada paso  

- Puedes crear anuncios, embudos, automatizaciones y reportes sin supervisión  

- Puedes configurar todo el sistema aunque empecemos desde nada  

- Puedes guiarnos con las mejores prácticas y lo que se debe hacer  

- Puedes manejar ambos negocios (bienes raíces + microschool) con confianza  



Buscamos a alguien proactivo, independiente y capaz de construir un sistema completo de marketing desde cero.



Soporte Telefónico Temporal para Inscripciones de la Microschool

Este puesto incluye contestar llamadas y responder a padres interesados en la microschool solo hasta que se llenen todos los cupos del año. Es temporal y únicamente durante la temporada de inscripciones.



Tus tareas serán:

- Contestar llamadas de padres interesados  

- Seguir un guion sencillo que proporcionamos  

- Explicar lo básico del programa  

- Agendar llamadas de inscripción  

- Enviar mensajes de seguimiento  

- Registrar las consultas en GoHighLevel  



Una vez que se llenen todos los cupos, esta responsabilidad termina, y el puesto será 100% marketing y manejo de anuncios.



---



Habilidades Deseadas

- Experiencia con anuncios de bienes raíces  

- Experiencia con anuncios para padres/educación  

- Edición de video corto  

- Conocimiento de la cultura hispana  



---



Compensación

- $700–$1,200 USD al mes (dependiendo de experiencia)  

- Posición estable a largo plazo  

- Bonos por desempeño  



---



Cómo Aplicar

Por favor envía:



1. Un video corto presentándote (Inglés + Español)  

2. Ejemplos de anuncios que hayas manejado  

3. Embudos que hayas creado en GoHighLevel  

4. Tu tarifa mensual esperada  

5. Tu disponibilidad (horas + zona horaria)

title: Experienced QuickBooks Bookkeeper Virtual Assistant – Amazon Expertise (Day/Night Shifts)
description:
We are a multi-million-dollar e-commerce company in the USA.



We are looking for an experienced bookkeeper who is not afraid to learn new things daily, for our E-commerce business. This is a high-growth position. You must be a self-starter and love to learn new things!



As a bookkeeper, the ideal candidate is highly driven, enjoys working with numbers, is detail-oriented, and is familiar with Amazon Seller Central and other online marketplaces. This individual will be the primary point of contact for our bookkeeping. The candidate should be experienced and know how to set up QuickBooks. The ideal candidate must have previously successfully delivered P&L reports to the accountant. You may also be required to learn other e-commerce-related skills to fit in with our existing operations. You must be a leader, reliable, communicative, and willing to learn.



If you would like to apply, please answer the questions below and send them to 
 let us know the following answers:



1. How many years of bookkeeping experience do you have?



2. What bookkeeping software do you use, ie. Quickbooks?



NOTE: Failure to follow the exact instructions in your responses will immediately disqualify you. You will NOT be considered if you do not follow the instructions and send back your reply listed herein.



Duties & Responsibilities:

-Reconciliation

-Entering bills

-Paying bills

-Expenses

-Credit card usage

-Bank statements

-Balancing checks

-Amazon reports

-Profit and Loss reports

-Monthly balance sheet

-Making sure all finances are up to date

-Setting up and entering everything into QuickBooks

When applying for the position, please include QuickBooks in the title.



This position is full-time. However, initial training may be part-time only to get new hires up to speed.



???? Application Instructions (Please Read Carefully)



Please attach your resume in PDF format within your OnlineJobs.ph application.



Use the following file name format:



Resume – [Your Full Name] – [Position Applying For]



Example:

Resume – Juan Dela Cruz – QuickBooks Bookkeeper Virtual Assistant – Amazon Expertise



Applications that do not follow the required file naming format may not be considered. Attention to detail is important for this role, and we review only candidates who carefully follow instructions.



****DO NOT apply if you cannot fulfill the job requirements OR are not detail-oriented ****
